variables.name: has_lantern
variables.description: The brass lantern is in the partys hands.

variables.name: scout_ally
variables.description: Finch the caravan scout taught the party his signals.

variables.name: has_sigil
variables.description: The Redtooth shamans bone sigil, key to the wardens ways.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=90 beats='dusk arrival in Barrowmere after three days walking from Millbrook, market row shutting, the watch calling the hour, a crowd at the notice board under the gate lamp, and the sign of the Gull and Lantern creaking over warm window light'>>

choices.label: Read the notice board.
Walk the market row before the stalls close.
Go straight into the Gull and Lantern.
Cross to the gate square and the candle vigil.
Stop at the little shrine of the road inside the gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the commission bill under the marshals gray wax seal, fifty crowns to find the Dunmere caravan and bring its people home, signed Marshal Hedda, and beneath it three older bills for missing sheep gone unanswered'>>

choices.label: Ask the gate watchman about it.
Take the bill into the inn and sign on.
Admit this is beyond you and turn for home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='old watchman Colm leaning on his spear, saying the caravan is two weeks late, that one scout came back raving about teeth painted red on the waystones, and that Hedda posts coin because the garrison cannot leave the walls'>>

choices.label: Thank him and head into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the road home to Millbrook under the first stars, no shame in knowing your measure, though the creak of the inn sign follows you like a question you will carry all winter'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the last stalls of market row, a tinker named Josser packing crates, and on his cart a squat brass lantern with a shutter and fresh wick, priced at most of your coin'>>

choices.label: Buy the brass lantern.
Buy rope and trail rations instead.
Keep your coin and listen to the crowd.
Poke through Jossers crate of oddments.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='nearly every coin handed over, Josser showing the shutter trick and the oil reservoir, the lantern heavy and honest on your belt'>>

choices.label: Head into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='a fair trade for good hemp rope and a sack of waybread, Josser nodding approval and muttering that the hills eat the unprepared'>>

choices.label: Head into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='two drovers by the well arguing over the vanished caravan, one blaming wolves, the other whispering about red teeth painted on stones up the old track'>>

choices.label: Head into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='pushing straight through the inn door on an empty stomach and a full head, the warmth hitting like a wall, and a red cloaked stranger at your elbow before your eyes adjust, offering work'>>

choices.label: Hear the red cloak out.
Shrug past into the common room.
Stop by the fiddler sawing out the old lay of Harrowstone.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the Redcloak table, six hard grins and a captain named Vane offering porter wages and a kit fee paid up front, his eyes already counting your coin'>>

choices.label: Pay the kit fee and join them.
Back away and find your own footing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='waking at dawn to find the Redcloaks gone with your kit fee and the road empty, Marta shaking her head, the lesson bought and the commission ridden off without you'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the common room of the Gull and Lantern, low beams and lamplight, innkeep Marta drawing cider, a gray clerk at a corner table with a ledger, and the commission bill nailed beside the hearth'>>

choices.label: Take the room in before you act.
Look in on the stable yard before the warmth.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='marking the room, a broad dwarf mending a shield strap by the fire, a sharp eyed woman running a dice game, a girl with an herb satchel reading by candle, and the clerk watching over his ledger'>>

choices.label: Go to the clerk about the commission.
Order supper and listen to the room first.
Take Martas cellar errand chalked on the slate.
Warm your hands and watch the fire crowd.
Sit with the silent drover table.
Tip Pip the pot boy for the kitchens view of things.
Ask Marta about her oldest lodger upstairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='onion pie and Martas quiet gossip, goblins seen on the drover track, the Redcloaks hiring porters at poor wages, and her opinion, unasked, that the dwarf by the fire is worth six of them'>>

choices.label: Take that thought to the clerk.
Talk the commission over with the whole room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Martas errand, a copper to fetch the good cask from a cellar where something has been scratching, the trapdoor breathing cold, the scratching proving to be rats at a loose grate, and your shin finding an iron hoop in the dark on the way out'>>

choices.label: Collect the copper and see the clerk.
Take the bruise, the copper, and the lesson to the clerk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the fire crowd read like a page, and Pells low voice at your shoulder naming them, Bram Ironhand who held the border shieldwall, Sable who has walked every track in the Hollow Hills, and Elowen, old Aldous the hedge wizards apprentice'>>

choices.label: Go to the clerk with your reading done.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='Pell the marshals clerk taking your name in a careful hand, laying out the terms, find the caravan and bring its people home, and the condition, none go alone, bring three companions to the east gate by dawn or the writ goes to the Redcloaks'>>

choices.label: Start with the dwarf by the fire.
Step out to the yard to think it over.
Study the survey maps Pell keeps under the lamp.
Hear Pells last word off the ledger.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the inn yard under cold stars, your grandmothers short sword an awkward weight, Millbrook and its safe small fields pulling one way and the notice bill pulling the other'>>

choices.label: Go back in and start with the dwarf.
Own your measure and take the road home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the long walk home begun by lantern light, the fifty crowns left for harder hands, and years later you will still wonder who brought the drovers home, or whether anyone did'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Bram Ironhand by the fire working an awl through a shield strap, a border veterans scars and a mug gone cold, having already turned away two hires tonight without looking up'>>

choices.label: Offer coin, loud enough for the room.
Speak plainly of the missing drovers and their families.
Say nothing and hold the strap steady for his awl.
Buy him a proper ale and wait him out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the dwarfs eyes lifting flat as slate, saying coin talk is cheap talk, and the one question that matters coming anyway, what will you do when it turns bad and running looks wise'>>

choices.label: Answer honest, afraid and going anyway.
Boast that you fear nothing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the telling landing true, nine drovers and a merchant missing, children at Dunmere lighting window candles, and the dwarf asking the only question that matters, what will you do when it turns bad'>>

choices.label: Answer honest, afraid and going anyway.
Swear you would never run from anything.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the strap held without being asked while the awl bites true, a grunt that might be thanks, and the question that matters, low, what will you do up there when it turns bad and running looks wise'>>

choices.label: Answer honest, afraid and going anyway.
Claim your nerve has never broken.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='Bram snorting like a bellows and going back to his strap for good, saying he has dug graves for a dozen fearless men, and by midnight no shield in Barrowmere will sign under you, the writ passing to the Redcloaks at dawn'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the awl set down, the axe taken up from under the bench, and the dwarf saying only that Ironhand comes, and that you should see to the dicer next if you have sense'>>

choices.label: Head for the dice table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Sable dealing dice with quick clean hands, hair cropped short, three knives visible and likely more, inviting you to sit with a grin that measures you for weight and worth'>>

choices.label: Play a few honest rounds with your last coins.
Sit but watch her hands instead of the dice.
Skip the game and offer the job flat out.
Stake your grandmothers sword on one roll.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='three small rounds lost and the third laughed at, which surprises her more than winning would have, and her price named, not coin but proof you can keep your head, the truth of the odds as you truly reckon them'>>

choices.label: Tell her the odds, bad and getting worse.
Dress the odds up pretty to close the deal.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the moment caught, a weighted die walking between her fingers smooth as water, her seeing you catch it, and the whole table waiting on what you do with it'>>

choices.label: Say it quietly, just for her.
Call the cheat for the whole room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the table erupting, a drover grabbing her collar, mugs going over, you backing into the cold yard, and Sable dropping from the woodshed roof laughing, saying you started her favorite kind of evening and did not even swing, which shows a rare cool head, and she is in for an equal cut'>>

choices.label: Shake on it and rest before finding the wizard.
Wade back inside to settle the drover.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the watch wading in with staves, a night in the lockup smelling of turnips, and Pell signing the writ over to the Redcloaks through the bars with an apologetic shrug'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Sable spinning a knife on its point, bored, asking why she would walk into goblin country for a farmhands handshake, and naming her price, the truth of the odds as you truly reckon them, no dressing'>>

choices.label: Tell her the odds, bad and getting worse.
Promise her glory and easy silver.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='Sable flipping her knife home and walking, saying pretty odds weigh more than packs in the hills, and without a scout who knows the tracks Pell cannot in conscience send you up the drover road'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the truth landing like a fair trade, an equal cut and first pick of boots agreed, and her nod at the herb girls empty chair, saying you will want a wizard for the stones and she knows where that one sleeps'>>

choices.label: Take a nights rest before finding the wizard.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='a straw bed in the loft, Bram snoring like a forge below, plans and fears trading watches in your head until sleep takes the field'>>

choices.label: Rise at first light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the herb yard gate at first light, Elowen arguing gently with old Master Aldous, who says the Hollow Hills killed better wizards than half trained girls, her satchel packed anyway, both of them turning to you as if you were the argument'>>

choices.label: Vouch for her to Master Aldous.
Offer to fetch her unfinished errand first, stormroot from the hedgerows.
Decide to go without a wizard.
Ask Elowen herself what she wants.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Aldous turning his milky eyes on you, asking what you will do the day his apprentice stands in over her head with her three small spells spent'>>

choices.label: Swear to send her home at first true danger.
Promise him glory and a tale for the guild.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the gate shutting with a hedge wizards finality, Elowen mouthing sorry through the slats, and Hedda refusing a crew of three for warded country, the writ gone by noon'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the hedgerows silver with dew, stormroot in the ditch shade with thorned runners crossed like a warning, cut clean at the joint the way Elowen calls through the gate, and Aldous weighing the root and the care it was carried with'>>

choices.label: Hand it over and let the root argue for you.
Hand it over and add your promise to send her home at true danger.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='the walk back toward the gate telling yourself steel and sense will do, while the waystone rumors and the word warded turn over and over in your head'>>

choices.label: Turn back and give Aldous your oath to send her home at true danger.
Report to the east gate with three of you.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='Marshal Hedda counting three where the writ says four, refusing to sign living people into warded country without craft, and the commission passing to the Redcloaks while you watch'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='warding chalk pressed into Elowens hand with orders to draw her circles small and come home, the girl shouldering her satchel with three spells and boundless questions, four of you now, a crew by any honest count'>>

choices.label: Report to Marshal Hedda at the east gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=90 beats='Marshal Hedda at the east gate at dawn, gray as gate iron, reading your faces like a muster roll, the terms once more, find the caravan and bring its people home alive, a road writ pressed into your hand, Pell inking a name in the ledger, the Company of the Gull and Lantern, shortened by the whole gatehouse at once to the Brass Lantern, and Josser the tinker calling from his cart one last time as the Kings Road runs east into mist'>>

choices.label: Trade your spare kit for Jossers brass lantern and march.
Take the road as you are.
Hear Heddas last word on the hills before you go.
Ask what head start the Redcloaks have.
Take your leave of the vigil grandmother at the gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Heddas flat refusal of carts or riders, the roads east torn by autumn rain and worse, and her parting word, that whatever painted those stones counts wheels as easy meat and walkers as slow meat, so walk fast'>>

choices.label: Take the road on foot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='a milestone where the ways part, the high road running open and fast along the ridges, the river landing below where a barge horn sounds, and the old drover track cutting rough and straight toward the rumors, Sable chewing a grass stem and waiting on your word'>>

choices.label: Take the high road along the ridges.
Ride the river barge from the landing.
Walk the old drover track.
Check the smoke rising off the second farmstead first.
Work the eel weirs below the landing for the shortcut.
Pay respects at the drover shrine in the hollow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the high road white and open under morning sun, carts long absent, weeds in the wheel ruts, Bram reading the empty road like a bad ledger, and a dust plume far ahead that could be riders'>>

choices.label: March to meet the riders openly.
Slip into the hedge and watch them pass.
Cut away from the road through the fallow fields at once.
Detour by the toll shrine keeper first.
Take the shepherds shortcut over the downs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='a kings patrol reined in, a tired sergeant saying the garrison rides no farther east than the toll shrine, that crows have been thick over the fallow country two days, and that red teeth on the waystones means the Redtooth band, who count and plan, and his advice, plain, turn back'>>

choices.label: Push on to the toll shrine.
Trade him tobacco for a look at his road map.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the hedge hiding you from the riders but not from three ragged deserters already in it, half uniforms and a rusty blade tapping a palm, naming a toll for the kings own road'>>

choices.label: Pay a little and pass.
Let Bram loom and talk them down, soldier to almost soldier.
Refuse and reach for iron.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='iron answered with iron and numbers, a gash across your sword arm and the party dragging you back west while the deserters whoop, the wound closing the season before the trail even warms'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='fallow furrows grabbing at ankles, the road dwindling behind, and wolves showing at the field edge before noon, five gray shapes pacing you, bold with winter coming'>>

choices.label: Stand together and drive them back.
Throw the ration sack and run for the shrine wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the sack buying twenty heartbeats, the pack running you down in the third field, companions dragging you back over the toll shrine wall alive but torn, the commission ended in bandages at Barrowmere'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the toll shrine at the roads high bend, its little bell stolen, its alms box pried open, and from its steps a view over the fallow country where crows wheel in a slow black funnel'>>

choices.label: Make for the crows.
Dig the stolen bell out of the ditch and rehang it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the sergeants map showing the fallow country and a farmstead shortcut, and the farmstead itself an hour later with its door open, porridge dried in the pot, and a fresh red tooth scratched inside the door frame over four tally strokes'>>

choices.label: Take the shortcut to the crow fields.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='shields and shouting, Brams axe haft cracking a gray skull sideways, the pack deciding you cost too much and flowing away north, scratches to bind and miles still to make'>>

choices.label: Bind up and make for the crows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the river landing, tar and eel smell, one barge working this late in the season, its master a knuckled old man named Weck who names a fare and does not haggle'>>

choices.label: Pay the fare and ride as cargo.
Work the pole and lines for passage.
Pay the eel boy on the landing for river news.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='deck space among onion sacks and Wecks slow telling, the caravan never reached Dunmere landing and no wreck came down the current, and old talk besides, of Harrowstone Keep above the Hollow Hills, king built, plague emptied, and lately burning green light at wrong hours, and goblins do not make green fire, scholars do'>>

choices.label: Watch the fog bank rolling in ahead.
Help Weck sound the channel as the fog takes you.
Lean out and study the strange wake in the fog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='passage worked honest, pole and rope burning your palms, Weck grunting approval and loosening by a knot an hour, wolves on the bank at dusk watching the barge pass like a moving fort, and fog rising off the water with the dark'>>

choices.label: Stand ready at the rail through the fog.
Sound the channel with the pole where Weck points.
Accept the charm Weck presses on Elowen at the rail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='shapes in the fog, a snagged tree taking the hull a glancing blow, the deck tilting, onion sacks going over while everyone grabs rope, and Weck putting in at Dunmere landing with a hole to patch, where families at the waterline ask after the caravan by name'>>

choices.label: Promise them word and follow the crows west.
Jump for the shallows when the hull hits.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the shallows deeper than they look, the current colder and stronger, dragged out coughing a mile downstream by Bram, kit lost, and nothing for it but the walk home'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the pole finding the snag before the hull does, Weck heaving the tiller past a drowned oak with a foot to spare, Dunmere landing at dawn, and a mother at the waterline holding a carved toy horse, saying merchant Tallow carried a sealed crate for the abbey at Northgate, a reliquary, freight paid double'>>

choices.label: Promise her word and follow the crows west.
Walk the last west bank stretch reading the mud.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the old drover track, turf worn to bone by generations of herds, the first waystone leaning like a bad tooth with a grinning row of rust red teeth painted across it, and Sable already on one knee reading the ground'>>

choices.label: Give her the hour to read it right.
Push the pace, reading can wait.
Hail the small figure watching from the rise.
Test the drover tables trick, count the teeth.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='Sables tally, many goblin feet moving east in order not raiding, laden wheel ruts a week old, and over them, days fresher, boots dragging as if driven, then the moor crossing, black pools between tussocks, Elowen counting the safe steps aloud'>>

choices.label: Step only where she counts.
Trust your own eye and take the straighter line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='fast miles until Elowen pulls everyone flat, a snare line of sinew strung clever across the track at ankle height, and past it more snares, the track itself gone hostile'>>

choices.label: Pick through slow and eat the lost time.
Keep the hard pace and sharp eyes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='your hail swallowed by the moor, then answered, one horn note far off, flat and wrong, Sable turning on you with a look that could skin, and small shapes trotting the ridgeline in files'>>

choices.label: Run for the fallow fields before the hunt gathers.
Go to ground in the gorse and let it pass over.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the counted steps holding, the moor giving way to fallow fields at last light, and ahead a slow funnel of crows turning over something the fields keep hidden'>>

choices.label: Make for the crows.
Read the last waystone properly before the fields.
Cut the flooded ford to save a mile.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='your step finding not tussock but glass still water, the moor swallowing you to the armpits, rope and four hands against the suck of it, and the crossing finished shivering on Elowens count'>>

choices.label: Wring out and make for the crow fields.
Thrash for the far bank alone.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the pool deeper than any moor pool should be, the cold taking the strength from your arms before the rope can reach, and the moor keeping what it catches'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the second snare taking Bram at the shin, sinew and a whipped blackthorn, blood in his boot and language that peels lichen, the fallow fields reached limping under the crow funnel'>>

choices.label: Bind it and make for the crows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='gorse needles and held breath, the hunt arriving in trotting files with one warg on a chain casting for scent, a spear length away and yanked off after rabbits, the moor breathing again at dusk'>>

choices.label: Rise and slip to the crow fields.
Crawl the ditch line out early while they cast.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the ditch ending in open turf under the wargs turning head, thrown nets and warg breath, trussed and carried north like a prize ham, the rescue needing rescuers now'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the crow field at last, and in a fold of the land the caravan, four wains overturned in a ring, goods strewn and rain spoiled, wheels to the sky like dead beetles, no people anywhere, and the crows walking the wreck like landlords'>>

choices.label: Search the wreck methodically.
Call out for survivors.
Let Elowen chalk a finding circle first.
Circle the field edge reading the ground before you go in.
Circle the whole field perimeter first.
Search Tallows overturned office wain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='methodical hands through the wreck, wool bales slashed, cider casks staved, a strongbox rack empty, and on the wain board a chalked manifest in merchant Tallows careful hand with one entry underlined twice, sealed crate for the abbey at Northgate, reliquary of the first seal, the only thing the raiders took'>>

choices.label: Search on for any of the people.
Pick the whole field over for gear worth saving.
Knuckle test the lead wains double floor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='your call rolling over the field, crows storming up in a black sheet, and under their racket, faint, from beneath the overturned lead wain, a knocking'>>

choices.label: Run to the lead wain.
Read the crows themselves before you run.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Elowens chalk circle on the wain board, dust rising in it to show what passed, small running feet in dozens, boots driven in a line northeast, and one pair of soft shoes walking untroubled through the middle of it all'>>

choices.label: Follow the picture to the lead wain.
Sketch the soft shoed walker for later and search on.
Check under the third wain where the dust shows small footprints.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the field edge telling its own tale, arrows fletched in black gathered like dropped quills, rope ends cut in hanks, drag paths pointing northeast toward the hills, and blood browned on a wheel, days old'>>

choices.label: Close in on the wreck ring.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='no bodies anywhere in the ring, which is its own strange mercy, and then, beneath the lead wain, a knocking, weak but stubborn, something alive under smashed casks'>>

choices.label: Get the wain off whoever knocks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the field picked over for rope, oil, a sound wheel spoke, and too long about it, the crows going up all at once for a reason that walks on two legs, goblin stragglers come back to pick the picked bones'>>

choices.label: Scatter into the ditch line and regroup at the lead wain.
Stand in the wreck ring and fight.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='ditch mud and held breath, small feet pattering the field above, one bark of goblin laughter at the wreck, then quiet, and a knocking from under the lead wain that will not quit'>>

choices.label: Get the wain off whoever knocks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the wreck ring a poor fort, hooks and nets from every side, taken trussed like market geese and marched northeast laughing, prisoners of the Redtooth with the rescue now needing rescuers'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='a man pinned under the wain bed in a hollow of smashed casks, gray faced, leg wrong, a scouts oiled cloak, croaking that his name is Finch and that he has been three days listening to crows learn new words'>>

choices.label: Lever the wain with a wheel spoke, slow and sure.
Lift it on Brams count, fast and hard.
Dig the casks out from around him first.
Send Elowen for fever herbs before you lift anything.
Fetch the wagon jack from the office wain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the spoke lever creaking the wain up a hand at a time, Sable dragging Finch clear smooth as a knife from a sheath, Elowens herb craft and a splint from spoke wood, and his grip on your wrist, saying a scouts luck rides with whoever pulled him out of the dark'>>

choices.label: Hear everything he knows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the lift taking every back at once, the wain rising a foot, Finch hauled out as Brams boot slips and the weight comes down like a falling roof, bruises for everyone but the scout free, fevered and grateful past words'>>

choices.label: Splint him and hear what he knows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='casks rolled clear one by one, patient as drystone work, but the wain settling with each one gone, Finch whispering to hurry, the last cask pinned under the axle itself'>>

choices.label: Lever the axle now, no more time.
Wedge the axle with the spare wheel first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the axle levered on nerve alone, the wain lurching, Finch snatched clear with the boards kissing his boot heels, alive and white as chalk, and you no better'>>

choices.label: Splint him and hear what he knows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the spare wheel wedged true, the lift easy after, Finch out clean and propped against a cask hoop, managing half a grin and calling it the driest rescue he has had all week'>>

choices.label: Splint him and hear what he knows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='Finchs telling by shaded light, goblins by the score at dusk, arrows from the ditch, everyone alive roped and marched northeast at spear point, a man in ash gray robes paying the chief in old silver and counting the crate like a father counts a child, then his map scrap spread on a wain board, causeway, goat path, culvert, charcoal tunnels, and the Redtooth horn calls taught, two short for all clear, long and falling for hunt loosed, before night and the storm behind it choose your camp for you'>>

choices.label: Fire in the deep hollow.
Cold camp in the hedge bones.
Push the trail through the storm dark.
Rig Finch a shelter first, whatever it costs.
Shelter in the old field barrow with the leaning stone.
Take first watch beside Bram.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='flame in the hollow, wet boots steaming, stew from rations, warmth working into bones, and past midnight, eyes at the firelight edge, low and paired and green'>>

choices.label: Wake everyone slow and stand to arms.
Throw light, shout, and rush the eyes.
Sit Sables knife lesson by the settling embers.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='a quiet stand of iron and torches, the eyes counting costs, wolves after all and not the other thing, gone by the time the storm breaks over the hollow'>>

choices.label: Sleep in watches to dawn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the rush finding wolves not goblins, a snapping scramble in the wet dark, one gray body and one bitten forearm to show for it'>>

choices.label: Bind it and sleep in watches.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a cold camp in the hedge bones, rain like thrown gravel, sleep in shivers and watches, but no light to call anything down on you, and by the small hours the storm passing east dragging its skirts'>>

choices.label: Rise stiff at dawn.
Read the hedge bones properly by lantern shade.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the trail through the storm, lightning printing the fields white, a washed out bank giving way underfoot into a rushing ditch, the night charging a toll for every mile'>>

choices.label: Haul out and shelter till the worst passes.
Keep pushing hard through the flood dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the second washout worse than the first, an ankle turned in a drowned rut and fever by morning, carried to a drover hut, the trail dead cold before you can walk again'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a shelter rigged for Finch from wain boards and oiled cloak, water and waybread in reach, his voice following you out, send word to Hedda by the first honest traveler, and mind the horns, then the storm night passed in the lee of the wreck itself'>>

choices.label: Rise at dawn and take the drag trail.
Spend the shelter hour flat over Finchs map arguing ways in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='dawn on the drag trail, rope fibers on thorns, a childs shoe set neatly on a stone as if to be found, and by midday, in a sunken lane, a stuck cart with a willow cage lashed on, one lamed goblin driver cursing a mule, and in the cage a boy in drover browns watching you through the withies'>>

choices.label: Rush the cart before it matters.
Let Sable parley from the bank.
Shadow the cart and take it after dark.
Set Sables tin whistle decoy beyond the hedges.
Rush the sunken lane before reading it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the rush covering half the lane before the driver gets its horn up, Brams axe haft ending the note early, the mule bolting, the cage cart slewing into the bank'>>

choices.label: Cut the boy free.
Chase the bolting mule down the lane.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the chase rounding the lane bend into the returning escort, spears from three sides and nowhere to be, the lane holding you like its own cage, and the last thing seen a red tooth grin'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Sables lazy voice from the bank in trade pidgin, a full ration sack offered for one skinny boy, the driver weighing spear and sack with the mule dead lame and its escort a mile gone, and commerce older than kingdoms winning again'>>

choices.label: Unlash the cage and see to the boy.
Walk a while beside the boy and let him talk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the cart shadowed to dusk through the hedgerows, patience like toothache, the driver camping in a fold with the cage rope round its wrist, and a choice of knives or nerve'>>

choices.label: Cut the rope and lift the boy out quiet.
Take the whole cart, mule and all.
Go through the drivers satchel on the lashing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the mule with opinions about strangers at midnight, braying like a war horn, the driver waking swinging, a scramble in the dark to get the boy and go with the noise hunting behind you'>>

choices.label: Run east with the boy and lose the noise.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=90 beats='the boy out of the willow cage, Tam of Dunmere, thirteen and furious and trying not to cry, telling between bites of waybread how the walkers were driven to the stone keep on the hill, how the goblins call their chief Vessk, how the ash robed one they all step wide of is named Malverin, and how a guard bragged the stone door under the keep opens at moonset three days hence when the seal thing sings, then Tam pointed south with waybread and a message for Hedda learned by heart, walking backward waving until the hedge takes him'>>

choices.label: Turn northeast for the Hollow Hills.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the Hollow Hills at dusk from a heather spur, gray whalebacks one behind another and on the second ridge the keep, Harrowstone, squat and broken crowned with watch fires already lit, Finchs map alive in your memory, four ways in, the causeway and gate, the goat path up the north cliff, the old culvert under the east wall, and the charcoal burners tunnels into the hill itself'>>

choices.label: Walk up the causeway bold as brass.
Climb the goat path up the north face.
Find the culvert mouth under the east wall.
Enter the charcoal burners tunnels.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the causeway by night, a stone tongue over black bog, wind snapping torch flames on the gatehouse, and halfway along a toll of sorts, two goblin spears leaning on a brazier while their owners dice for teeth'>>

choices.label: March up like you are expected and paid for.
Crawl the causeway shadow line under the parapet.
Wade the bog margin and flank the brazier.
Swing up the drain chain to the gatehouse roof.
Wade the arch shadows under the causeway itself.
Wait for the change horn that empties the brazier post.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='chin high past the brazier with a purposeful stride and a mutter about silver for the ash robed one, the dicers squinting, one rising with a tilted head, smelling wrongness but slow about naming it'>>

choices.label: Toss them a coin and keep walking.
Bark at them in your best angry trader voice.
Keep silent and keep walking when they hail you.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the shadow line under the parapet, elbows and knees on cold stone, the dice game rattling a spear length overhead, a dropped die bouncing once and rolling to a stop against your knuckle'>>

choices.label: Freeze and let them fetch it.
Palm the die into the bog and flow on.
Rise and dash the last stretch to the arch.
Check the chain locker grating in the footing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the bog margin to the waist, cold sucking at every step, torchlight wobbling on the water while you flank wide of the brazier, something long and smooth sliding past your shin in the dark'>>

choices.label: Hold still until it passes.
Push hard for the gate footing now.
Study the pale lights drifting over the bog around you.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the coin spinning firelit into a leather palm, the toll of the world working on goblins too, waved past with a grunt into the shadow of the gatehouse arch'>>

choices.label: Slip through the wicket gate into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the trader voice landing half right, the dicers arguing with each other about whose fault you are, and the argument becoming your door as you stride under the arch unquestioned'>>

choices.label: Cross into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the older dicer naming the wrongness at last, a horn snatched up, the causeway filling both ends with spears and no bog deep enough to hide in, taken to the cells with the toll still in your pocket'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the fetching hand groping a hands width from your hood, closing on the die, and withdrawing with its prize while your heartbeat tries to give you away, then the long crawl finished under the arch'>>

choices.label: Slip into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the die palmed into the bog, the game dissolving into accusations of theft, both spears forgotten against the brazier while the causeway shadow carries you to the arch'>>

choices.label: Slip into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='stillness while the smooth thing coils past twice and loses interest, the bog letting you go with a sound like a kiss, the gate footing reached mud blind and shivering'>>

choices.label: Climb the footing to the wicket gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='the push waking the bog, mud to the chest, the long smooth thing turning back with purpose, Brams arm hauling while Sable throws knives at ripples'>>

choices.label: Kick free and scramble to the gate footing.
Tear loose whatever it costs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the bog winning the argument, black water closing over torchlight, hauled out at last on the wrong side of empty lungs, carried down the causeway wrapped in cloaks, the hills done with you this season'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='a horn from the gatehouse before the arch is even close, long and falling, the hunt loosed, and nothing left but the running retreat off the causeway with spears rattling behind'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the north face by moonlight, the goat path a rumor of ledges stitched up the cliff, wind combing the heather flat, Sable already ten feet up saying it is easier than it looks and lying'>>

choices.label: Climb steady, testing every hold.
Climb fast between the wind gusts.
Rope the party together first.
Let Sable hunt the cliff for the old warden stair.
Wait out the deep watch in a cliff hollow first.
Deal with the hawks eyrie blocking the second pitch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='holds tested and trusted one at a time, the valley tilting away beneath your heels, a ledge halfway up wide enough to breathe on, and above it the path pinching to nothing around a bulge of rock'>>

choices.label: Lead around the bulge yourself.
Let Sable find the line and follow her calls.
Read the rising wind and call the climb off.
Climb to the old beacon bracket for the sight line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='speed between gusts, fingers jammed in cracks while the wind tries its luck, good time made to the halfway ledge and the blood singing, the bulge above waiting like a held breath'>>

choices.label: Keep the pace around the bulge.
Steady down and follow Sables line.
Haul the pack strap instead of the next hold.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the rope shared out and knotted at waists, slower for the tangling but honest, the halfway ledge gained together, and Elowen white knuckled but counting her breaths like a good soldier'>>

choices.label: Send Sable ahead on the rope around the bulge.
Take the lead yourself with the rope paid out behind.
Wait out the wind on the ledge, roped and patient.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the bulge taken on friction and nerve, one foot swimming in air, two fingers in a crack that goblin masons cut before your grandmother was born, and the path opening again beyond into a walkers stroll to the wall base'>>

choices.label: Walk the last ledges to the broken wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Sables line threading holds you would never have seen, her calls floating down the rock, left hand high, trust the black knob, and the bulge behind you almost before the fear catches up'>>

choices.label: Walk the last ledges to the broken wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='pace kept until the wind cheats, a gust like a shoulder charge on the bulge itself, boots skating, the mountain deciding at leisure whether to keep you'>>

choices.label: Jam in and wait out the gust.
Lunge for the next hold through it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the lunge finding air where rock should be, the cliff turning over once, twice, and the heather coming up like a fist, the Hollow Hills keeping their oldest toll'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the wall base where the cliff did the masons work, a breach of tumbled stone under the broken tower, and above it a sentry walk where one bored goblin drags a spear butt along the parapet like a boy with a stick'>>

choices.label: Time the sentrys circuit and slip the breach.
Send Sable up to quiet the sentry first.
Wait for cloud over the moon, then all at once.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the circuit counted three times to be sure, forty heartbeats of empty parapet, and the breach taken on the fourth count in single file with the spear butt scraping away into the dark above'>>

choices.label: Drop into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Sable up the tumbled stone like thought, a scuffle above no louder than a settling roost, and her face over the parapet wearing the sentrys iron cap at a silly angle, beckoning'>>

choices.label: Climb through and drop into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='cloud swallowing the moon on its own schedule, the rush going up the stones in a clatter that the wind mostly covers, mostly, a goblin voice calling a question into the dark behind you'>>

choices.label: Freeze against the wall until it loses interest.
Drop into the ward fast and scatter to shadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the question asked twice and shrugged away, wind blamed as it always is, and the last of the breach crossed at a crawl with your cheek against old frost cold stone'>>

choices.label: Drop into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the wind rising to a decision at the halfway ledge, no way up and the way down a slide into dark, dawn finding the party pinned like moths and goblin ropes coming down almost politely'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the mountain saying no in gust after gust until even Sable calls it, the climb surrendered a ledge at a time, and the keep unentered behind you with only moonset left to matter'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the east ditch and the culvert mouth breathing cold, a rusted grate hanging by one hinge, knee deep water sliding out of utter dark, and somewhere far up the pipe a slow drip keeping time'>>

choices.label: Light the brass lantern and shutter it low.
Feel your way in through the dark.
Send Sable ahead striking tinder sparks.
Sound the pipe mouths by knuckle tap first.
Dam the flow at the mouth before you wade.
Start Elowens counting song and walk it in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the shuttered beam turning the drain honest, a dry ledge above the waterline, side mouths marked with goblin tallow smears, and wedged behind a fallen block a waxed satchel, someone elses secret stash of oil and dried eel'>>

choices.label: Walk the dry ledge to the inner grate.
Check the tallow marked side mouth first.
Search the side chamber off the dry ledge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='dark like a hand over your face, one palm on the right wall, water climbing thigh high and patient, side passages breathing on your cheek as they pass, and the count of steps the only map you own'>>

choices.label: Keep the wall and count on.
Wade the faster center channel.
Shout once up the pipe to test the echo.
Take the third side mouth on a guess.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='sparks like slow lightning, the drain jumping into being and gone again, Sable calling the shapes between flashes, ledge left, block right, and the counting of side mouths going somewhere wrong'>>

choices.label: Trust her count to the inner grate.
Stop and recount at the next spark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the inner grate chamber, lantern light on a lock pin rusted to lace, the pin eased out with oil and patience, the grate swung on rag muffled hinges, and stairs beyond going up into the outer ward'>>

choices.label: Climb into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the side mouth opening on a goblin bolt hole, bedding of dry bracken, a tally wall of scratched teeth, and a shelf with a horn on it, which is worth more than eel, taken quiet as thought'>>

choices.label: Back out and take the ledge to the inner grate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the wall count holding true, the inner grate found by touch, its lock pin worked loose by feel with skinned knuckles and whispered arithmetic, and the hinge giving one dreadful creak before wet rags kill it'>>

choices.label: Ease it open and climb into the ward.
Force it in one fast shove and rush the stairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the center channel deeper than reason, chest cold, and something long bumping your leg once, twice, curious the way eels are curious about drowned things'>>

choices.label: Back slow to the wall and go on by touch.
Stab at the bump and push through.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the recount finding the error, a side mouth taken for the main run, the party stood in a cistern chamber under a chimney of rotten rungs with the draft telling the truth of the way back'>>

choices.label: Follow the draft back to the main run.
Risk the rotten rungs straight up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the grate screech running up the stones like a struck bell, boots and torches converging on the stair head, and the drain refilling with spears behind you, taken wet and blinking in the torchlight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the stab answered in kind by something with more practice, the channel pulling the light out of the world, and the drain keeping its oldest secret one keeper richer'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the third rung going to wet powder, the fall short but the clatter long, and the long grope back to the ditch with the way in now watched, moonset one night nearer and nothing to show'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the burners dell on the hills flank, old kilns like beehives gone cold, tunnel mouths propped with charred timber, and one live kiln tended by a soot black old woman who watches you arrive as if she ordered you from a catalog'>>

choices.label: Ask the old burner for the way through.
Take the widest cart tunnel.
Take the narrow tunnel with the breathing draft.
Cross kiln to kiln and study the cart tunnel first.
Hear out the singed young burner selling a quick way.
Ask Mag about the wardens and her grandmothers day.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='Mag the burner trading her knowledge for town news and a look at your faces, her price fair, her tarred string pressed into your hand, follow it to the chimney and mind the third fork, the sweet smelling way is the dying way, and her kiln warmth soaking into cold bones while she talks'>>

choices.label: Follow the tarred string in.
Ask Mag to open the kiln heart itself.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the cart tunnel wide and rutted, fresh spoil in heaps, and light swinging ahead, a goblin dig crew with barrows coming out, their cargo rattling dry and pale, bones, crypt spoil hauled like potatoes'>>

choices.label: Hide in a side pocket and let them pass.
Back out quiet and take the draft tunnel.
Bluff the dig crew in trade pidgin.
Follow the diggings deeper toward the old air.
Learn the dig crews shift song through the props.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the draft tunnel tight as a sleeve, old props groaning learned complaints, charcoal grit in your teeth, and the draft on your face promising the tunnel goes somewhere the hill breathes'>>

choices.label: Shore the worst prop with a spare timber and go steady.
Squeeze through fast and trust the props.
Follow the sweeter smelling side mouth where the air runs warm.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the string running true through three forks, past the sweet smelling mouth where even the air feels sleepy, ending at a knot around a stone under a soot chimney, handholds cut old and sure, and gray night sky far above'>>

choices.label: Climb the chimney into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the dig crew trudging past a boot length away, complaining in goblin about quotas and the ash robed ones temper, one barrow left ticking over on a broken wheel, and the way ahead open to the spoil chute'>>

choices.label: Slip up the spoil chute into the ward.
Pilfer the barrow first for anything telling.
Hold the pocket while a second crew passes too.
Pull the manifest board off the broken barrow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the barrow yielding one coin among the bones, silver, old as kings, stamped with a crown no living herald would know, the ash robed ones pay dirt in your palm and footsteps returning up the tunnel'>>

choices.label: Pocket it and take the spoil chute now.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the prop shored, the sleeve of rock passed at a steady crawl, and the tunnel opening to a junction under a spoil chute with cart ruts crossing below, the hill above breathing slow and cold'>>

choices.label: Climb the spoil chute into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='speed and a shoulder catching a prop, the ceiling clearing its throat, a scramble through raining grit to the junction with the hill grinding shut behind you like a slow door'>>

choices.label: Climb the spoil chute bruised but through.
Go back for the dropped pack under the groan.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the ceiling keeping its promise, dug out by four pairs of hands with the tunnel gone behind you, alive and owning one boot between two feet, the hill closed to you and moonset closing in'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the sweet smelling way sweeter with every step until the lantern of your mind gutters, waking outside dragged by soot black hands, Mag shaking her head over you, one night gone and the strength for nothing'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the side pocket picked by the one goblin with a nose, barrows dropped, picks raised, the dig crew proving diggers can also count, and the count is four for the cells'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the outer ward of Harrowstone by night, watch fires at the corners, kennel stink and hay smell, a wain parked mid ward, and across open ground the inner keep door under its lamp, while along the east wall a barred grating glows faint, and behind it, shapes, the caravan folk, alive, close enough to hear a child coughing'>>

choices.label: Shadow hop the wall line toward the inner door.
Burrow into the hay wain bound for the inner yard.
Take the sentry post over the kennels.
Sound Finchs two short notes and walk across like you belong.
Walk straight across the open ward for the inner door, fast.
Cut through the banked smithy toward the inner door.
Work along to the east grating and the whisper behind it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the wall line shadow to shadow, past the cell grating where a drovers eyes meet yours and go wide, your finger to your lips, hope traveling through iron bars both ways, and then the kennels, a dozen wet noses reading the wind'>>

choices.label: Toss the dried eel and jerky along the kennel fence.
Freeze in shadow until the noses settle.
Push past the kennel fence quick and quiet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='hay dust and held sneezes while two goblins wheel the wain grumbling about the ash robed ones timetable, moonset moonset moonset like a curse, the wain trundling toward the inner arch with the party buried like winter apples'>>

choices.label: Burrow deep and ride it all the way in.
Slip out in the arch shadow as it passes.
Stay buried and ride the wain wherever it goes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the sentry post stair taken tread by tread, one goblin above yawning at the stars, Sables work quick and quiet as folding cloth, an iron cap and a watch horn for trophies and the post yours till the next relief'>>

choices.label: Signal all clear down the wall and cross by the stair.
Study the ward from above first.
Sound the captured horn to wave off the far fire.
Ride the well windlass down to the spring gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='two short notes floating over the ward, the corner fires waving back lazy, the ward crossed at a porters trudge with your hood down and your heart loud, goblin eyes sliding over you like rain off wax'>>

choices.label: Make straight for the inner keep door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the kitchen midden door in the wall angle, unbarred because no one guards a smell, the hinge greased with pot fat by some blessed lazy cook, and the party through it one at a time into onion dark'>>

choices.label: Climb the service stair to the under keep.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the great stair door under its lamp, iron banded, barred from within, but the bar throwing its shadow through the gap, and Sables knife walking it up and out of its brackets a finger width at a time'>>

choices.label: Ease the door and slip in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the inner yard by wain and shadow, unloading noise for cover, a doorway gulped one heartbeat after a torch passes, and the under keep stair found cold and quiet as a held breath'>>

choices.label: Descend toward the under keep.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the ward read like a page from above, fire circuits counted, the cell gratings guard change marked, the hay wains path chalked in memory, and the stair door bar glinting through its gap, knowledge worth the delay'>>

choices.label: Cross by the stair door with the count in your head.
Read the scratches around the inner door first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one nose winning the argument with the wind, the kennels going up like a kicked hive, torches converging, and the wall breach retaken a stride ahead of the pack, the hills hunting you home empty handed'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='open ground and a relief guard early to his post, the shout, the rush, nowhere on the bare cobbles to be anything but caught, and the cells gaining four new tenants who came to empty them'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the watch horn strange in your grip and the note coming out long and falling, the hunting call, the whole ward answering it on its feet, and the long way back over the breach with the hunt at your heels'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=85 beats='inside Harrowstone at last, the under keep stair coiling down into crypt cold, torch soot fresh on the ceiling, the child coughing somewhere below and to the east, and under everything, faint as a pulse, a sound like one low bell note that never quite ends'>>

choices.label: Follow the stair down into the under keep.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the under keep at the stair foot, three ways breathing three different airs, west toward the cells where the child coughs, center toward firelight and the snore of the great hall, east toward incense and a clatter like dice by the bushel, and under all of it the drums, slow as a sleeping heart, keeping rite time somewhere below'>>

choices.label: West, toward the cells and the cough.
Center, through the great hall.
East, toward the incense and the boneworks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='the war court from the shuttered gallery, Vessk of the Redtooth on a chair of wagon boards below, scarred captains in a half moon, and pacing the open floor with the reliquary cradled like an infant, Malverin the Ash Robed, explaining in a voice like cold water that at moonset the seal sings, the door opens, and the king under the hill rises to serve, while Vessk asks the only question with teeth in it, serve whom, and every drum in the deep answers nothing'>>

choices.label: Stay and hear the whole plan out.
Mark the guard rotations below and slip out early.
Study Malverin himself, robes, staff, and the sigil he wears.
Ease the shutter wider for a clean look at the whole court.
Angle for a look at the wizards traveling desk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the whole plan heard, the reliquary goes to the stone door at moonset, the shaman sings the seal awake, Malverin speaks the waking words from his book, the barrow king rises bound to the voice that woke it, and the Redtooth are paid in the dead kings silver and the caravan folk, Vessk spitting at that last, saying prisoners were never the bargain, the room going knife quiet before Malverin smiles it smooth again'>>

choices.label: Slip down toward the crypt stair with the whole shape of it.
Watch Vessks face a moment longer.
Stay for the captains muttered asides too.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the rotations marked from the shutter gap, torch relays already flowing down the processional stair by pairs, the war court emptying by rank toward the deep, and the routes below written in your memory like a stolen map'>>

choices.label: Drop to the emptying floor and follow the last relay down.
Drop to the floor before the court fully empties.
Fall in behind the plunder porters crossing the floor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='Malverin studied cold, ash gray robes too clean for this hill, a traveling book chained to his belt, soft shoes that walked untroubled through a massacre, and at his throat on silver wire a bone sigil twin to the shamans, the man armored in preparations, but his eyes going always to the reliquary like a debtor to a purse'>>

choices.label: Slip down toward the crypt stair.
Count the wizards pacing like a jailers rounds.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='down from the gallery by the service stair as the court breaks up beneath, captains barking march orders, the hill pouring itself toward the deep like sand through a glass, and the crypt approaches ahead of the crowd if you move now'>>

choices.label: Make for the crypt approaches.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Vessks face worth the wait, fear worn like a badly fitting helm, the chief glancing twice at the passage where his own grandmothers wisdom lives, dig not, wake not, and once, strangely, at the gallery shutter as if he felt eyes and wished them well'>>

choices.label: Slip down and make for the crypt approaches.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the last relay followed at lamplighter distance through emptying halls, torches shrinking to sparks down the processional stair, and a side arch offering the quieter crypt approaches to anyone brave enough to leave the light'>>

choices.label: Take the side arch to the crypt approaches.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the shutter slat chosen by one captain below for no reason but luck, eyes meeting through the gap, the gallery stair drumming with boots both ends, and the war court acquiring an audience it keeps'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the plan heard one sentence too long, the court rising all at once for the march, every stair and arch filling with ordered ranks, and the gallery a trap with a view, the party pinned till the sweep finds it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the crypt approaches under the oldest stone in the hill, the processional stair ringing with marching torches to the left, a spoil chute yawning black to the right, the old chapel drop shaft above a dry well straight ahead, and past all three, faint and patient, the one low bell note that never ends, the seal already half singing'>>

choices.label: Ride the spoil chute down, braking with your heels.
Leap the chute lip and slide it blind.
Climb down the chapel drop shaft by rope.
Shadow the processional stair behind the relays.
Send Sable alone ahead to read the door approaches.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the chute a childs nightmare of a slide, bone dust and speed, a heel brake learned in the first heartbeat, and the bottom arriving as a spoil heap in a crypt antechamber with the drums suddenly very near'>>

choices.label: Shake off the dust and find the stone door.
Surf the spoil heap the rest of the way down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the rope run down the dry well past dressed stone older than the keep, boots touching a floor of flagstones set by hands that measured in forgotten spans, and a passage breathing cold toward the bell note'>>

choices.label: Follow the cold passage to the stone door.
Swing wide on the rope to skip the last courses.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the processional stair taken in the relays own shadow, close enough to smell torch pitch, peeling off at the last landing into a side vault as the column wheels toward the barrow gallery, the stone door somewhere past its glow'>>

choices.label: Cut through the side vault to the stone door.
Stay in the columns shadow one landing further.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the chute forking mid slide where no map said fork, the wrong throat narrowing to a stone wedge, and the hill holding what it catches with the drums for company'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the column halting mid stair on some captains whim, torches wheeling, and the relays shadow shrinking to nothing around four strangers on the processional steps, taken in ranks to a cell with a view of the rite'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the west passage toward the cells, torch brackets far apart like bad teeth, the childs cough clearer with every step, a guard nook ahead spilling lamplight and the click of knucklebones, two voices arguing over the game'>>

choices.label: Wait out the game and slip past on the dark side.
Douse the nook lamp with a thrown wet rag.
Walk past purposeful with a stolen spoil barrow.
Rush the nook and put both guards down quiet.
Slip through the laundry vats and the servants way.
Listen at the second door to the strange soft clapping.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the game running long, curses and clicking bones, the dark side of the passage taken a boot length at a time, and one guard rising mid slip to fetch small beer from the barrel across the way'>>

choices.label: Melt into the wall niche and let it pass.
Roll under the beer barrel trestle.
Keep slipping past while he draws his beer.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the wet rag arcing true, the lamp dying with a hiss, the nook erupting in blame, each guard sure the other elbowed it, and the passage crossed in the arguing dark'>>

choices.label: Press on to the cell block corner.
Cross upright and quick while they blame each other.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the barrow trundling past the nook at a laborers slouch, one guard glancing up, seeing only spoil and boredom, waving you through with a bone still in his fist, the lie walking on wheels'>>

choices.label: Park the barrow at the cell block corner.
Wheel it straight through to the block without pausing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the rush crossing the lamplight in two heartbeats, Brams haft and Sables pommel landing together, both guards folded into the nook like laundry, and the knucklebones still rattling to a stop on the board'>>

choices.label: Bind and gag them and take their keys.
Drag them into the dark cell at the corner first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the niche holding you like a coffin holds, the guard trudging past close enough to smell, small beer fetched and the game rejoined, and the cell block corner gained on held breath'>>

choices.label: Study the cell block from the corner.
Whistle the block an all clear as you come.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the trestle shadow low and rank, boots passing at eye level both ways, and a long crawl out the far side with the cell block corner ahead'>>

choices.label: Study the cell block from the corner.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the cell block corner reached, the passage behind still arguing or still bored, and ahead, iron doors down both walls with the cough coming from the second on the left'>>

choices.label: Study the block before you touch a door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='guards trussed with their own belts, gagged with the game bag, and a ring of keys heavy as a promise in your hand, the block corner just ahead'>>

choices.label: Study the block, keys ready.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the dark cell taking the sleepers like a cupboard, its door left friendly ajar, and the corner gained with the nook behind you looking merely empty, not raided'>>

choices.label: Study the block from the corner.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the beer guard turning at the wrong instant, eyes meeting eyes, the shout and the whole west wing answering it, the passage filling both ways, and the cells gaining four tenants who came to empty them'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the barrow wheel finding the one loose flag in the passage, spoil and bones ringing on stone like a dinner gong, and the nook guards proving faster than they looked, run down in the west wing dark'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the cell block by grease lamp, nine iron doors, a warder asleep in a chair under the key board with one boot on a stool, the cough again behind the second door left, and through its grate, merchant Tallow himself, gray but unbroken, mouthing one word, moonset'>>

choices.label: Lift the key board over the sleeping warder.
Work the second doors lock with Sables picks.
Whisper with Tallow through the grate first.
Wait for the warder to roll deeper asleep first.
Send Sable to spring the kennel gate as a diversion.
Lift the block floor grate and go under the cell row.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the key board a hand above the warders hat, lifted key by key so none swing and kiss, the chair creaking once like a question, and the ring coming away whole into your palm'>>

choices.label: Open Tallows door first.
Open the far cells first, working toward the cough.
Snatch the whole ring in one quick motion.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Sables picks talking to the lock in little clicks, the wards old and honest and no match for patience, the bolt drawn back sweet as a spoon from pudding, and Tallows hand already at the gap'>>

choices.label: Open the door and hold the hinge quiet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Tallows whisper through the grate, nine alive counting the child, the warder sleeps but the relief comes when the torch burns to the ring, and the ash robed one has promised the goblins the whole caravan as payment the night the door under the hill opens'>>

choices.label: Lift the keys and start on the doors.
Ask him what Malverin took to the crypts.
Take Tallows whispered muster of all nine.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the doors opened one by one on hinges fed with lamp grease, drovers rising stiff and silent, a mother lifting the coughing child, nine faces asking the same question with no sound at all, what now'>>

choices.label: Ready them and plan the out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the far cells opened first, drovers waking their neighbors with hands over mouths, the block filling with standing shadows, and the second door last, the child lifted, the cough smothered in a borrowed cloak'>>

choices.label: Ready them and plan the out.
Light the block lamps to work faster.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Tallows answer flat with fury, the reliquary of the first seal, abbey freight under his own bond, an old lock in the shape of a box, and whatever it locks shut is under this hill, because the ash robed one reads to it at night like a suitor'>>

choices.label: Lift the keys and open the doors.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the relief guard early, torch not yet at the ring, iron doors standing open and nowhere to put nine people and a cough, the alarm bell ringing the west wing awake, and the block refilling with more tenants than it started with'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one key swinging into its neighbor with a chime small as a teaspoon, the warders hand closing on your wrist before his eyes even open, old reflexes in an old chair, and the shout bringing the wing down on the block'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the plan whispered in the empty cell, nine people cannot sneak past a live ward, but at moonset the keep empties to the barrow for the rite, so they hide till then, armed with the warders knives, and go out the culvert grate when you signal, Tallow gripping your arm, saying find what Malverin fears and break it, and the drovers already prying the grate pins in the boneyard drain'>>

choices.label: Hide them in the dry cistern off the block.
Hide them in the old chapel loft above the boneworks.
Move them now along the west wall to the culvert itself.
Arm everyone and rush the ward gate together, now.
Split the party, half to the gallery, half holding here.
Let Tallow swear the freight oath over the block.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the dry cistern swallowing nine people and their breathing, water jars and warder bread handed down, the child asleep at last against the mothers shoulder, and the lid stone eased back with a straw width of air left'>>

choices.label: Leave them the signal word and go for the court gallery.
Leave Sable to guard them and go on lighter.
Seat the cistern lid full shut to be safe.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the chapel loft reached by the bell rope stair, dust of a hundred quiet years, the boneworks clatter below covering nine sets of footsteps, and the drovers settling among broken pews like patient ghosts'>>

choices.label: Leave the signal word and make for the court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the west wall walked in file at a crawl, every buckle muffled in rag, the culvert grate reached and the pins already loose, nine people folded into the drain mouth dark with the water at their ankles and their hearts in their teeth'>>

choices.label: Set the signal and climb back for the court gallery.
Push them faster through the drain while the way is clear.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the signal set, one long whistle down the drain at moonset, repeated by a drover to the next hiding and the next, a thread of breath holding nine lives, and the court gallery stairs ahead'>>

choices.label: Climb to the war court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Sable staying with a shrug that fools no one, three knives laid out in front of her like cutlery, and the way to the gallery lighter and lonelier both'>>

choices.label: Climb to the war court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the climb back from the culvert through the boneyard drain, cold to the knees, the keep above beginning to stir with torch relays toward the crypts, moonset gathering the hill like a drawn breath'>>

choices.label: Climb to the war court gallery.
Borrow a sconce torch against the drain dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the cough coming at the worst turn of the west wall, a torch swinging round, nine people flat in shadow and one small chest heaving, the shout going up, and the whole rescue marched back to the block at spear point, you among them'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the drovers refusing the wait, knives up, an honest doomed rush at the ward gate that the ward answers with numbers, the yard a churn of torches, and the party swept back out the culvert alone, the rescue broken on its own courage'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the center passage opening on the great hall of Harrowstone, roof beams lost in smoke, a bonfire in the old king hearth, goblins asleep in windrows among the benches, and at the far dais a war banner of red teeth over a heap of caravan plunder'>>

choices.label: Cross the hall floor among the sleepers.
Take the smoke loft along the roof beams.
Circle by the armory corridor instead.
Climb to the minstrel boxes along the halls flank.
Check the trophy wall behind the dais stair.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the hall floor a puzzle of sprawled limbs and dice cups, bonfire light breathing shadows across it, each step planned two ahead, a snoring champion rolled against your shin like a log that mutters'>>

choices.label: Step the long way around the muttering one.
Step over him between snores.
Nudge him gently out of the path with a boot.
Buy the old hall hound with the last of the jerky.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the smoke loft by ladder and nerve, roof beams wide as a plank bridge and slick with soot, the hall crawling below like a dropped anthill made of sleep, and halfway across, voices at the dais worth stopping for'>>

choices.label: Stop above the dais and listen.
Cross straight over and down the far ladder.
Hurry the crossing at a soot slick trot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the armory corridor rank with goose grease and iron, racks of spears in bad order, two smiths arguing over a broken chain shirt at the forge glow, and beyond them the armory proper standing open'>>

choices.label: Wait out the argument in the rack shadow.
Slip past while they shout.
Bluff past the smiths as spoil porters.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the long way threading dice cups and dreaming spears, the muttering champion left to his argument with sleep, and the dais stair gained in the hearths blind spot'>>

choices.label: Climb to the gallery landing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the step over timed to a snore that stops mid stride, one boot in the air above a goblins chest while his eyes move under their lids, the snore resuming like a tide, and the dais stair a lifetime later'>>

choices.label: Climb to the gallery landing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the dais voices plain from above, a scarred captain telling a shaman half the band wants to march home, that the diggers hear knocking from the wrong side of the stone door, and that Vessk has promised the ash robed one two more nights and not one more bone'>>

choices.label: Take that gold and cross to the far ladder.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the beams crossed at a soot black crawl, the far ladder creaking once like a settling roost, and the gallery landing reached above the sleeping hall'>>

choices.label: Take the gallery landing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the argument running long enough to grow old in, then the smiths stamping off to supper with the chain shirt unresolved, and the armory standing open and unwatched with the forge banked low'>>

choices.label: Go through the armory.
Help yourself to the forge tongs on the way.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='past the forge glow at a crouch, one smith turning to spit at the quench trough, hammer smoke and a held heart, and the armory door gained while the argument peaks behind you'>>

choices.label: Go through the armory.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the muttering champion muttering awake, one yellow eye finding your boot in the firelight, the hall rising around you in a wave of iron, and the wave carrying four strangers to the cells like driftwood'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='soot winning the argument with boot leather, the beam gone from underfoot, the hall floor coming up through firelight, and the Redtooth learning at once that they have visitors, briefly'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the gallery landing above the dais, plunder heaped below like a dragons nursery, and among it, boxes with the abbey freight brand, but no reliquary, only its packing straw, and a passage behind the dais lit fresh, the way Malverin went'>>

choices.label: Follow the fresh lit passage toward the war court.
Search the plunder heap for anything that serves.
Pick the newer lock on the under dais strongroom.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the armory of Harrowstone under goblin management, racks askew, and treasure for the taking, oil flasks, a coil of climbing rope, drover knives by the sheaf confiscated from the caravan, everything a rescue wants except time'>>

choices.label: Take knives and oil and go for the war court.
Sabotage the racks, bowstrings, and spear hafts first.
Strip the armory of everything four backs can carry.
Tip the quench trough and walk out in the steam.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the fresh lit passage smelling of tallow and old stone, voices ahead in council rhythm, question and answer and a cold voice that needs no raising to be obeyed, the war court in session somewhere ahead'>>

choices.label: Close on the voices to the gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the plunder yielding a drovers horn on a strap, a tin of lamp oil, and under the packing straw a wax tablet in a fine hand, a delivery note, the vessel travels at moonset to the door, payment on opening, signed with a single ash gray M'>>

choices.label: Pocket the note and follow the lit passage.
Take the whole tablet stack for Hedda.
Set Elowen on the tablets ciphered margins.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='knives bundled, oil slung, the racks left standing but lighter, and the armory door eased shut on the forge glow with the corridor beyond running toward the council voices'>>

choices.label: Follow the corridor to the war court gallery.
Carry the oil uncorked for speed.
