nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='quiet sabotage in the rack shadows, bowstrings nicked to break at the pull, spear lashings loosened a turn, the goblin arsenal turned half against itself, patient work with the forge hissing counterpoint'>>

choices.label: Finish and follow the corridor toward the voices.
Fire the oil rack and be done properly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the oil catching with a whump that lights the corridor both ways, alarms beating like a second heart, the keep pouring toward the smoke, and the party swept out a drain mouth by heat and numbers, the keep roused and the captives beyond reach tonight'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the passage ending at a curtained arch with torch glow through the weave and the council voices close enough to count, the war court just beyond'>>

choices.label: Slip through to the court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the corridor rising by a service stair to a shuttered balcony, the war court sound swelling under it, drums somewhere deeper keeping a slow rite time'>>

choices.label: Ease the shutter and take the gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the second smith turning for his dropped tongs at the wrong breath, iron eyes on soft shadow, the forge bell hammered flat and fast, and the armory corridor filling from both ends with everything it was built to hold'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one more armful proving one too many, a rack tipping its neighbors in a bright cascade, and the hall next door rising to the ring of its own stolen iron, the way out bought with everything dropped'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the east passage toward a clatter like dice by the bushel, the boneworks, the old chapel stripped to a workshop where goblins sort crypt spoil into baskets, and beyond it, behind a hide curtain painted with teeth, the den of the Redtooth shaman, keeper of wards, and if Finchs map is right, of keys'>>

choices.label: Work through the boneworks as spoil sorters.
Take the chapel loft and cross above the sorting floor.
Follow the incense smell around by the shrine niches.
Light a heavier pot and move inside the smoke drift.
Slip into the saints crypt behind the boneworks first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='baskets shouldered among the sorters, heads down in the lamplight, bones passing hand to hand with tally chalk squeaking, and the foreman goblin counting workers twice and frowning at the arithmetic'>>

choices.label: Keep sorting till his count loses interest.
Send Sable to knock a shelf over across the floor.
Drift for the curtain while he counts the far rank.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the chapel loft above the sorting floor, dust and dove bones, the painted curtain visible below and the shamans smoke seeping through it in lazy question marks, a bell rope hole offering a way down behind the niches'>>

choices.label: Rope down behind the shrine niches.
Watch the curtain first and learn the dens traffic.
Swing down the bell rope hole directly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the shrine niches in single file, old saints defaced with red teeth, incense thick enough to chew, and a novice goblin tending smoke pots with its back turned and its ears full of its own humming'>>

choices.label: Slip past the novice niche to niche.
Wait for it to carry smoke through the curtain, then follow.
Lift the novices bone flute and play the summons.
Corner the shaking novice softly in the niche shadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the count losing to boredom as counts do, baskets drifting your crew toward the curtain end of the floor, and the hide curtain a spear length away breathing smoke at the edges'>>

choices.label: Set the baskets down by the curtain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the shelf going over in a bright clatter of femurs, the floor converging on the mess and the foremans language, and the curtain end left as empty as a yawn'>>

choices.label: Cross to the curtain in the noise.
Pocket a tally chalk as you cross.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the rope run smooth to the niche shadow, boots finding old altar stone, and the curtain edge close enough to read the newest tooth painted over a saints patient face'>>

choices.label: Take the curtain edge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the dens traffic learned from above, a novice in with smoke at intervals, a digger out with a basket once, and between visits a long solitary droning from within, the shaman working alone at something that answers him in creaks'>>

choices.label: Rope down and take the curtain between visits.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='niche to niche behind the novices humming, saints for cover and smoke for a cloak, the curtain edge gained with the humming never missing a note'>>

choices.label: Take the curtain edge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the novice shouldering through the curtain with its pots, the hide swinging wide for one long breath, the dens firelight and bone racks printed on your eyes, and the way in walking open behind a goblins back'>>

choices.label: Follow through on its heels.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the foremans arithmetic coming out four heavy, chalk snapped, the shout, sorters swarming like the floor itself stood up, and the boneworks sorting four new items into the cells'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the bell rope hole wider than the rope is long, the drop finishing on a shrine shelf in a peal of brass smoke pots, and the east wing arriving before the echoes leave, the way back up a receding dream'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the shamans den through the curtain gap, firelight and bone racks, wardings knotted from sinew and teeth swinging slow in the smoke, the shaman itself hunched over a scrying bowl droning at the water, and on a thong at its belt, a sigil of yellowed bone carved with the same crown the old silver wears, the twin of the seal on the crypt door if Tam heard true'>>

choices.label: Lift the sigil from the belt while it scries.
Free the caged crow spirit to buy a bargain.
Put the shaman down fast before it can cry out.
Back away, the wards are not worth it.
Push straight through the curtain at a walk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the theft a lesson from Sable performed with your own hands, thong cut on the drone downbeat, sigil riding your palm still warm from the fire, and the scrying bowl showing, upside down and rippled, four small figures crossing a moor at dusk, yesterday watching you back'>>

choices.label: Slip out with the sigil before the water clears.
Linger to read the bowl over its shoulder.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the wicker cage opened, the crow spirit unfolding like smoke deciding to be wings, the shaman spinning from the bowl, and the spirit speaking in dropped feathers and dust, one debt owed, name it, while the shaman freezes at the sight of its leverage standing free'>>

choices.label: Name the sigil as the debt.
Name safe passage as the debt.
Name the shamans true name as the debt.
Let the nosy spirit gossip past its debt.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the rush crossing the den in a breath, Brams palm ending the drone mid note, the shaman folded gently as a dropped robe, the wardings swinging their teeth in the disturbed smoke, and the sigil there for the cutting'>>

choices.label: Cut the sigil free and bind the shaman.
Grab for the sigil first and the shaman second.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the retreat measured and quiet, wards unrisked, the den left to its droning, and the court gallery still to reach with what you know and what you lack weighing about the same'>>

choices.label: Make for the war court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='out through the curtain on the downbeat, the drone unbroken behind you, the sigil warm as a stolen egg in your shirt, and the boneworks recrossed in the sorters shift change'>>

choices.label: Climb toward the war court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the crow spirit dipping once like a bow, the sigil thong parting at a feather touch, the bone sliding across the floor to your boot while the shaman watches its own luck leave with the smoke, and the debt paid in full'>>

choices.label: Take the sigil and go for the gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='safe passage paid in a wing beat, the den and the boneworks passing you like a held breath, unclutched, unseen, the east wing behind you before the smoke settles, though the sigil stays droning at the shamans belt'>>

choices.label: Take the gallery stairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the sigil cut free and the shaman bound in its own wardings, tucked behind the bone racks like a rolled carpet, the den left droning to nobody, and the gallery stairs ahead'>>

choices.label: Climb toward the war court gallery.
Question the bound shaman before you go.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the way to the gallery by the shrine niches, incense trading places with torch smoke, the drums from below finding their slow rite time in your pulse whether you want them there or not'>>

choices.label: Climb to the war court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the scrying water clearing at the worst moment, the shamans drone becoming a shriek that carries through stone, wards snapping their teeth in the smoke, and the east wing folding in on the den with you inside it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the shaman faster than a hunched back promises, a bone dart from the smoke and a numbness spreading like spilled water, the den tilting sideways, and the drone the last sound the dark keeps'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one warding brushed at the curtain edge, its teeth chattering like a struck cup, every knotted charm in the den answering in chorus, and the retreat through the boneworks run at a rout with the alarm chewing at your heels'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='the crypt antechamber at the edge of torchlight, and beyond it the barrow gallery, a hall older than the keep above, pillars like a stone forest, the great sealed door at its heart with the reliquary already set on a trestle before it, drummers ranked in a side gallery, the Redtooth pooling in from the processional stair, Malverin unchaining his book, and the one low bell note swelling like water behind a dam, moonset close enough to taste'>>

choices.label: Open the wardens postern with the bone sigil.
Go down the long stair through the pillar shadows.
Sound Finchs calls and turn the Redtooth against the wizard.
Climb through the drummers gallery above the floor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the sigil warm against a hidden slot beside a blank wall panel, stone swallowing bone with a sound like a sigh, and a wardens passage opening unbreathed for centuries, running behind the gallery wall toward the heart of the barrow'>>

choices.label: Follow the passage at a hunters trot.
Read the warden carvings as you go.
Widen a spy slot for a proper look first.
Search the wardens armory niche as you pass.
Study the choir murals where the spy slots pause.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the passage striped with spy slots, the rite assembling in flashes, drummers, ranks, the trestle, Malverins open book, and the passage ending at a postern behind the sealed door itself, close enough to touch the trestle shadow'>>

choices.label: Take the postern to the doors blind side.
Stop at the hinge slot and learn the singers breath.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the carvings a wardens catechism cut in old strokes, the king below did not die, he was stopped, the seal is not a lock, it is a lullaby, and the last stroke deepest, wake him for nothing, no crown is worth the winter he brings'>>

choices.label: Carry that truth to the doors blind side.
Hunt the carvings for the seals own weakness first.
Pry at the deepest carving for the crown behind it.
Study the last mural panel a breath longer.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the doors blind side, stone cold as a dead hearth, the trestle and the reliquary a spear length away through the postern crack, Malverins voice beginning the waking words on the far side of everything you came to stop'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.
Widen the postern crack for a better view first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the weakness found in a wardens honest hand, the seal sings itself, it needs no wizard, but a wrong note breaks the verse, strike the reliquary while it sings and the song starts over from silence, knowledge like a knife you carry to the doors blind side'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite with the knife of it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one spy slot widened by impatient fingers, mortar dust sifting into torchlight on the gallery side, a goblin face turning up at the wrong moment, and the wardens passage becoming a stone sleeve with both ends held, taken like a ferret from a burrow'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the long stair hugging the gallery wall, pillar shadows striping every landing, the Redtooth ranks facing the door with their backs to you, and the trestle far below glowing in its own lamp ring like the only lit stage in a dark theater'>>

choices.label: Descend shadow to shadow between drumbeats.
Take the maintenance ledge behind the pillar tops.
Join the last rank of the procession itself.
Take the pillar forest floor on your belly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the drumbeats a ladder for footfalls, down and hold, down and hold, ranks close enough to count scars, and a captain turning to scan the stair a heartbeat after your shadow folds into a pillars'>>

choices.label: Hold frozen through his sweep.
Flow on during the next beat anyway.
Glide down two flights in one beat to be past him.
Count the lamp ring before the last flight.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the ledge behind the pillar tops, a masons walk never meant for boots at speed, the whole rite laid out below like a map of itself, and the ledge ending at a carved head whose ear is a step and whose shoulder is a drop to the doors blind side'>>

choices.label: Climb down the carved head.
Run the ledge upright to save time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the sweep passing over your stillness like light over stone, the captain turning back to the door, and the last flight taken to the barrow floor where the trestle lamp ring begins'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the flow costing a scrape of boot on grit, one ear below twitching, a shove of held breath, and the barrow floor gained with your heart trying to leave through your teeth'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the carved head bearing you down feature by feature, ear, jaw, shoulder, the drop landing soft on old dust in the doors blind shadow, the waking words beginning somewhere above your head'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.
Take the carved faces front in the open instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='one rank wheeling on some order you never heard, torchlight finding you mid stair with nowhere to fold, and the long stair becoming a short parade to the trestle, prisoners presented to the wizard like a gift'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the masons walk shedding its edge under one boot, the pillar top tilting away, and the barrow floor rising through drum time, the rite pausing one beat for the sound and going on without you'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the horn cold at your lips in a side vault off the gallery, Finchs calls learned at a wrecked wain now aimed like a weapon, and below, Vessk standing apart from the wizard with his honor guard, a chief watching his own band being spent on another mans war'>>

choices.label: Sound the hunt loosed call, pointed at the wizard.
Sound the all clear, then walk to Vessk openly.
Sound the calls at half breath to stay quiet about it.
Approach the honor guard captain under a plain horn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the long falling note rolling through the gallery like cold water, every goblin head lifting, hunt loosed, hunted where, and eyes finding Malverin at his trestle one suspicious heartbeat before the captains start shouting contradictory orders'>>

choices.label: Slip down through the confusion toward the trestle.
Sound it again from a new vault to feed the panic.
Sound the hunt call a third time for good measure.
Harvest the confusion for gear and watchwords.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the all clear buying you a corridor of doubt, then Vessks honor guard parting on his flat gesture, the chief looking you over like a wagon he might buy, saying in trade tongue that his grandmother forbade this hill, and asking what a dead kings wardens want with a living chief'>>

choices.label: Tell him the truth, the wizard will feed the Redtooth to the barrow.
Offer him the caravan plunder to march home now.
Demand he stand his band down in the marshals name.
Press Vessk for hostages and weapons both.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the confusion a moving forest of spears looking outward for a hunt that does not exist, and you moving through it like weather, the trestle lamp ring a dozen strides ahead'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the second call folding the gallery into honest panic, ranks colliding, drummers losing the rite time, Malverins voice rising sharp for order in a language goblins do not love, and the trestle standing briefly unregarded'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite through the churn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the truth landing where Vessks fear already lived, his slow nod, the murmured order that moves captains like gears, half the Redtooth simply turning and marching for the stair while the wizards voice climbs behind them, and Vessks parting word, the door is yours, warden, we were never here'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite as the ranks thin.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='plunder weighed against fear in a chiefs ledger, the offer taken with a spit and a handshake, captains peeling ranks away by the dozen, and the gallery emptying around a wizard too deep in his book to count his army yet'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite as the ranks thin.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the call cracking on a cold lip, half hunt, half nothing, and every ear in the gallery knowing the difference, the side vaults swept by ranks with torches until the horn is found still in your hand'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='an honor guard axe turning you back at the last stride, Vessk shaking his head slow, saying some bargains stink worse than barrows, and the wizard looking up from his book at the disturbance with eyes like counting weights'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the drummers gallery a balcony of skin drums and sweating backs, the rite time hammered out under torch smoke, scaffold poles and old bell hooks overhead, and a drum captain pacing the line with a knotted cord for timekeeping and discipline both'>>

choices.label: Cross behind the drummers under the scaffold.
Climb the bell hooks above the smoke.
Shoulder a skin drum and join the relief line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the crossing paced to the pounding, each stride swallowed by a beat, the drum captains cord snapping inches from your cheek as he disciplines a lagging drummer, and the gallerys far stair in sight'>>

choices.label: Take the far stair down to the floor.
Cut a scaffold lashing as you pass, for later.
Cross inside the drum line where the smoke is thickest.
Count the rite time from inside the drum line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the bell hooks a ladder for hands above the smoke, the whole rite mapped below, ranks, trestle, the doors seal beginning to glow along its carvings like a struck harp string, and a hook line running down to the pillar tops'>>

choices.label: Slide the hook line to the pillar shadow.
Climb higher into the smoke for a hook line nearer the door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the far stair taken in drum time, floor dust underfoot, the lamp ring of the trestle glowing ahead through a forest of legs and spear butts all facing the wrong way'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='one lashing parted with a knife whisper, the scaffold holding its breath on a single knot now, a lever against the rite for whoever needs it, and the far stair down to the floor'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite with the scaffold in your pocket.
Cut a second lashing to be sure of the scaffold.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the hook line humming under your grip, the slide fast and blind through smoke, boots catching pillar stone in the deep shadow, the waking words starting somewhere ahead like frost forming'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the drum captain turning at nothing, at instinct, the knotted cord pointing straight at your crossing, drums collapsing into alarm beat, and the gallery balcony a box with one door and it is full of goblins'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the smoke thicker than any map of hooks, one handhold that is only shadow, and the long reach into it ending the climb, the drummers never missing a beat below as you are carried out'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='the rite from the doors blind shadow, Malverin reading the waking words in a voice like frost spreading, the shaman singing to the reliquary until the seal carvings glow along the great door, stone grinding as it stirs in its frame, the bell note swelling toward moonset, and one breath in which to choose what breaks first'>>

choices.label: Snatch the reliquary off the trestle mid verse.
Set Elowen and her chalk against the shamans song.
Send Bram to overturn the trestle lamp ring, darkness.
Speak the wizards name from the dark, just his name.
Wait one more verse for a perfect moment.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the reliquary snatched mid verse, the seal answering with a note gone wrong, a scream of stone on stone, the song collapsing, and the box bucking in your hands like a live thing until the recoil tears it loose to skitter across the flags'>>

choices.label: Dive behind the pillars as the wizard turns.
Stand and face him over the fallen box.
Chase the skittering box across the open floor.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Elowens chalk circle flaring like a struck match, her small clear counter chant threading the shamans song and snapping it, the drummers losing the time, the seal glow guttering, and the shaman rounding on the dark with its teeth bared'>>

choices.label: Rush the trestle while the song is dead.
Leave Elowen to duel the shaman and circle wide alone.
Add your own voice to the counter chant.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Bram hitting the trestle like weather, the lamp ring going over in a sheet of burning oil and darkness, the reliquary rolling loose across the flags, goblin voices climbing over each other, and the waking words stopping mid syllable'>>

choices.label: Hunt the rolling box in the dark by its hum.
Scatter blind into the dark with everyone else.
Kick the burning oil across the processional rugs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the name landing in the gallery like a dropped blade, Malverin stopping mid word, a scholars vanity turning to find its audience, his eyes hunting the dark while the seal glow steadies and dims, and his voice, pleasant as a letter opener, offering partnership to whoever knows him well enough to interrupt'>>

choices.label: Refuse him with silence and move on the trestle.
Step into the light and accept his bargain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='ash gray light hammering the pillar where you stood, stone hissing, the wizard advancing on the fallen box with his book held open like a shield, and the gallery behind him folding into rout as drums die'>>

choices.label: Circle to put the box between you and him.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the face off over the fallen box, Malverins book open, your iron out, the half woken door grinding its slow inch behind you both, and everything in the gallery that is not running already, watching'>>

choices.label: Hold his eyes and buy the party position.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the trestle rushed through dead song, the shaman bowled aside into its own smoke, the reliquary knocked spinning from its cradle to the flags, and Malverins voice behind you going from frost to fire'>>

choices.label: Turn with the box between you and the wizard.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hum hunted through burning oil light and screaming shadow, one hand closing on cold metal at the same instant a soft shoe pins the other end, the wizard and you joined by a box neither owns yet'>>

choices.label: Wrench it free and give ground.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=65 beats='the perfect moment arriving one verse too late, the seal singing itself open, the great door swinging wide on a cold that puts out torches, and something crowned standing in the dark of it as the waking words end, the hill emptying around you in a rout that carries the party out like flood wrack, alive, to watch green light burn in Harrowstone all winter'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='ash gray light finding you a half step slow, a hammer of cold that makes no sound at all, and the barrow gallery tilting up to meet you with the song starting over somewhere far away'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the shamans answering shriek older than its wards, teeth in the smoke, sinew charms snapping tight around wrists and word alike, and the rite resuming behind you as you are dragged to watch it from your knees'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='too many hands in your own darkness, goblin night eyes better than yours ever were, the reliquary rolling to a soft shoed stop somewhere out of reach, and the lamp ring relit around four bound guests of the rite'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=65 beats='the bargain accepted in front of witnesses who melt away wisely, Malverins smile like a signature drying, and the fine print arriving as the sigil at his throat warms, an apprenticeship of errands and wards and never quite leaving, the company walking out of Harrowstone without you while the wizard finds you endlessly useful'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='the turn of the whole night, the reliquary on the stones between you and the wizard, the seal song fallen back to silence, the great door stuck half a hand open with something gray groping patient at the gap, Redtooth ranks routing up every stair with their drums dead, Malverin measuring you over his open book, and your own body telling you plainly how much it has left'>>

choices.label: Stand, take the box, and end the ash robed ones night.
You are spent, dive for the box and run for your lives.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the last stand made standing, Bram a wall on your left, Sable a rumor on your right, Elowen chalking fast behind, the box snatched to your chest singing low against your ribs, and Malverin coming on with ash light gathering in his free hand like weather deciding'>>

choices.label: Strike the book from his hands.
Give ground and let the groping gap have him.
Rush him bodily with Bram, rope ready.
Race him to the box barehanded, speed against sorcery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the book struck spinning from his grip on Sables thrown pommel and your lunge, pages fluttering like a shot bird, the gathering light dying unspent, and the scholar suddenly only a man in gray backing away from four angry children and a dwarf'>>

choices.label: Let him run into the dark and see to your own.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='ground given a step at a time until the cold of the gap breathes on your neck and you sidestep, the gray hand closing instead on the voice that woke it, gentle as a debt collector, Malverins last word a bargain no one hears out, and the door grinding shut again on its own hunger'>>

choices.label: Stand very still until the stone is quiet.
Crowd him into the gap yourself, hand against hand.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the rush a drovers answer to sorcery, Bram taking the ash light on his shield boss with a grunt like a struck bell, the wizard borne down under honest weight and drover rope, trussed with his own chained book for a pillow'>>

choices.label: Haul him up and signal the out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the scramble lost by a fingertip, the wizard winning his own weight in vanity back, box and book both, ash light herding the party up the dead stair while he laughs like a ledger closing, the hill lost, the rite only postponed until the next moonset'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='one step too near the patient gap, the gray grip finding your shoulder instead of his, cold beyond argument, and the last thing over the threshold of hearing is the seal starting its lullaby again, for you'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the dive taking the box on bleeding knuckles, no strength left for wizards, only for running, Bram scattering a brazier behind you, Sable calling the turns, Elowen throwing her last chalk to flare blinding white at the wizards feet, and the hill above you waking like a kicked hive'>>

choices.label: Run for the culvert line and the drain.
Run for the wardens ways and out the long dark.
Turn at bay in the antechamber arch.
Cut past the half open door itself, the shortest line.
Climb against the rout and take the roofline out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the culvert line run on fumes, the long whistle sent ahead down the drain, iron grates and cold water, hands hauling hands until the ditch takes you all in a tangle under the last of the moon, the keep above roaring at its own emptiness'>>

choices.label: Count heads in the ditch and move.
Stop to wrap the humming box mid run.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the wardens ways swallowing the party one by one, the sigil slot sighing shut on the wizards curses, stone passages older than the Redtooth running dark and patient under the hills, and Elowens last candle stub lighting spans measured by dead men'>>

choices.label: Walk the long dark out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the antechamber arch a fine place for a last stand and a poor one for living, spears filling it end to end while ash light seals the far arch, the box prised from your arms almost gently, and the cells after all, with the rite to be rebuilt by the next moon'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the shortcut past the half open door a memory before it finishes, the gray reach faster than tired legs, cold taking the sound out of the world, and the seal singing you down into the dark it guards'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='the way out with the box singing low and the wizard finished, the keep above already emptying as Redtooth ranks stream for the hills, the cells giving up their people into the ward, Tallow counting drovers aloud like a man counting his own heartbeats, the child asleep at last on Brams shoulder, and the east showing gray as the company walks out the broken gate unopposed'>>

choices.label: Take the road home to Barrowmere.
Parade the bound wizard once around the ward first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='the quiet after the door, Redtooth drums sounding retreat far above, and Vessk himself at the antechamber arch with his honor guard, looking long at the shut door and the box in your arms, saying his grandmother was right and the bargain is done, the Redtooth march at dawn and the prisoners walk free as his word on it'>>

choices.label: March everyone home under a goblin chiefs strange safe conduct.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the ditch and the drover country beyond, nine freed souls and four spent ones moving from hedge to hedge as the keep burns torchlight at its own shadows, Tallow leading by ways only carters know, the box wrapped in a cloak and still humming its one low note against your back'>>

choices.label: Walk the last miles into dawn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the wardens ways giving out at last through a fox thicket door in a dell two hills south, stars overhead like spilled salt, the long way round begun on aching legs with the box quiet at last, as if it knows it is walking away from the door it sings to'>>

choices.label: Take the long way home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Barrowmere at midmorning, the company walking up the Kings Road with nine souls behind them and the reliquary of the first seal in an iron banded box, Hedda meeting you at the gate with the whole town at her back, Finch on a crutch grinning like a split melon, fifty crowns counted and the Company of the Brass Lantern toasted under its own sign, and in the quiet after, Malverins burnt notes spread on Heddas table, one line legible where the fire failed, the second sleeps beneath the Greymarsh'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the strangest homecoming Barrowmere has seen, a goblin honor guard halting at the third milestone to watch nine freed prisoners and four ragged heroes walk the last stretch alone, Vessks parting gift a red tooth drawn on your map over the Greymarsh with a warning growled in trade tongue, the pale ones dig there too, and Hedda paying fifty crowns to a company that made a chief keep his word'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='dawn over the drover country and Barrowmere bells at the sight of the column, nine souls delivered footsore and laughing at nothing the way the rescued laugh, the reliquary set on Heddas table still faintly singing, Tallow signing his freight bond closed with a shaking hand, and the marshal reading the one legible line of the wizards burnt notes twice before she says it aloud, the second sleeps beneath the Greymarsh'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the long way round ending three days late through the south fords, the town half into mourning bands when the company walks in whole, the reliquary delivered with fox thicket burrs still in everyones hair, Hedda docking nothing from the fifty crowns and adding a map besides, because the wizards trail runs south into the Greymarsh and someone will have to follow it'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the gate square where the watch sergeant takes names by lamplight, and along the wall a quiet line of Dunmere families holding candles for the caravan, a vigil that has learned not to hope loudly'>>

choices.label: Speak with the families at the vigil.
Press the sergeant for what the watch really knows.
Sign the watch roster for steady wages instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a grandmother pressing a candle stub into your hand, names recited so they stay real, Tallow, Berta, young Tam, nine souls and a hundred small facts that could matter, who limps, who is brave, who is only eleven'>>

choices.label: Carry the names into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the sergeants honesty bought with patience, the watch is forbidden past the toll shrine by standing order, two scouts went anyway, one came back raving of red teeth, and the marshal posts civilians because her hands are tied'>>

choices.label: Take that into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='steady wages and a wall to walk, the sensible choice everyone praises, and all winter from the parapet you watch the east road for a caravan that someone else will have to bring home'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Jossers crate of oddments, a whetstone, a tin whistle, and a water stained page of some old survey showing the Hollow Hills with the keep drawn in and a spidery note, drains east under the wall, sold for three coppers as waste paper'>>

choices.label: Buy the survey page and head for the inn.
Chase the cutpurse who just lifted your coin.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the cutpurse faster in his own alleys, his friends slower and larger, your coin gone and your ribs bruised in a lesson about chasing shadows into shadows, the commission signed by others while you mend'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the drover table where the older road men drink in silence for the missing, one of them drawing the drover track in spilled cider, marking where the waystones turn wrong, and muttering that whoever goes should count the teeth painted on each stone, the count means something'>>

choices.label: Commit the cider map to memory and see the clerk.
Join their talk of a vengeance ride tonight.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the vengeance ride mustering half drunk at moonrise, brave and shapeless, scattered by warg howls before the second milestone, and the marshal confiscating everyones boots for a fortnight of cooling heels, the commission gone to cooler heads'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the fiddler earning her supper with the old lay of Harrowstone, a kings hall raised on an older hill, a winter that came up from under it, and a warden order that sang the hill to sleep and sealed the song behind a stone door, verses everyone knows and no one believes'>>

choices.label: Drop a copper in her hat and see the clerk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a fresh mug set at the dwarfs elbow without a word, drunk without a word, and at the bottom of it the same question that matters, what will you do up there when it turns bad and running looks wise'>>

choices.label: Answer honest, afraid and going anyway.
Say whatever sounds bravest.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='your grandmothers short sword laid on the dice table as a stake, the whole room inhaling, Sable reading the blade and then you for a long moment, then rolling, winning, and sliding the sword back across the felt, saying anyone who bets what they love to be taken seriously deserves the truth test instead'>>

choices.label: Tell her the odds, bad and getting worse.
Snatch the sword back and call the dice crooked.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the accusation landing on the one honest roll of the night, the room turning its shoulders, Sable already gone through some door nobody saw, and no scout in Barrowmere willing to walk with a welsher come morning'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the question put to Elowen herself instead of over her head, what she wants, and her answer to Aldous quiet and square, that she is going, master, with leave or without, and better with, because the hills are warded and the wardens are gone and somebody who listens has to look'>>

choices.label: Stand with her and let her words finish it.
Undercut her with a joke to ease the old man.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the question about the Redcloaks head start, and Heddas dry answer, Vane marched his porters up the high road at first light making enough noise to warn every crow in the county, so the quiet ways may matter more than the fast ones'>>

choices.label: Take the road with that in mind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='an old shrine keeper sweeping the toll shrine steps as if the bell were still there to serve, trading his last winter apples for news, and giving back better, the crows funnel over the second fallow, and at night he hears carts on the drover track that never pass his shrine'>>

choices.label: Thank him and cut for the crow fields.
Ask him about the keep on the hill.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the keepers voice dropping though the road is empty, Harrowstone was sealed for reasons, his own grandfather carried mortar for the warden order, and if lights burn green up there then someone is reading books that should have stayed chained'>>

choices.label: Carry that to the crow fields.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the shepherds shortcut a shortcut for shepherds, the party benighted in a fold of the downs with a turned ankle and a cold rain, limping back to the toll shrine by dawn with the trail a day older and the season closing like a door'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Wecks grandnephew mending eel traps on the landing, paid a copper to talk, which he does at flood volume, the caravan never came down to the water, but three nights back something big and quiet poled downriver in the dark without lights, riding low, like a load of stone, or coffins'>>

choices.label: Board the barge and watch the water with new eyes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='leaning out to read the strange wake in the fog, the rail greasy under your palm, the river taking its chance, and the cold closing over the story of your season like a ledger shutting'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the drover tables trick tried on the first waystone, count the teeth, four on the first stone, five on the second, the count climbing as the track goes east, Elowen working it aloud, not decoration, a tally, distance markers counting down to something'>>

choices.label: Follow the count east with fresh eyes.
Send word of the tally back by a passing shepherd first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the shepherd solemn as a magistrate about the errand, the tally sketched on birch bark for Hedda with the party initials under it, insurance of a kind, if the hills keep you at least the count comes home'>>

choices.label: Turn east on the heels of the message.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the crows themselves read like a page, Elowens trick, where they walk bold the dead are old news, where they spiral shy something still moves, and over the lead wain they spiral shy'>>

choices.label: Go straight to the lead wain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the wreck ring circled twice at bow range, arrows counted by fletching, black feathered and cheap, loosed in one volley from the ditch, and in the ditch itself, neat lines of pressed grass, the ambush bedded down half a day waiting, patient as winter'>>

choices.label: Close in on the lead wain with the picture whole.
Climb the ridge for a lookout of your own.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the ridge lookout you never marked marking you instead, one horn note rolling over the fallow country, and the long grass answering it from three sides, the field taken from the field'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Elowens list of what the splint needs against fever, willow bark and bog myrtle from the ditch line, gathered at a run while the light dies, the wound packed and the scouts breathing easing by the time the stars come out'>>

choices.label: Hear everything he knows once the fever eases.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='shelter option nobody loves, an old field barrow with a leaning door stone, dry inside and quiet as held breath, Elowen chalking the threshold and declaring it merely dead, not restless, which is the best word in her vocabulary tonight'>>

choices.label: Sleep dry in the dead mans doorway.
Reconsider and take the cold hedge instead.
Wedge the door stone half shut for safety.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='a dry night among polite bones, the storm spending itself on the door stone, and dawn arriving through the crack like a coin under a door, the party rested and a story richer'>>

choices.label: Rise and take the drag trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the door stone shifting in the small hours, not from inside, from out, wedged shut by small laughing hands, and two days lost digging free into an empty field with the trail gone cold as the barrow'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Sables decoy played out in the sunken lane, the tin whistle from Jossers crate skirling like a wounded hunt horn beyond the hedges, the lamed driver hobbling its mule around the bend to look, and the cage standing unattended for the length of a held breath'>>

choices.label: Cut the boy out in the gap.
Take the mule and cart too for the wounded.
Whistle the hunt call for a bigger distraction.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the whistle a note too true, answered by a real horn two fields over and then by feet, many, the lane flooding with the escort come back early, and the party run west empty handed with the boys eyes following through the withies'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the gatehouse roof reached by the drain chain at the causeway end, slates loose as bad teeth, a murder hole breathing torch smoke from the guard room below, and the inner ward laid out upside down in the smoke shimmer'>>

choices.label: Cross the slates to the wall walk.
Listen at the murder hole first.
Cross the slates at a hunters trot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='slates crossed on all fours with the wind helping badly, the wall walk gained between sentry rounds, and a stair down into the outer ward shadow'>>

choices.label: Take the stair down into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the murder hole delivering guard room gossip with the smoke, the ash robed one pays moon by moon, the diggers hate the deep levels, and the password for the wicket tonight is bone price, worth more than a ladder'>>

choices.label: Down the inner chain to the ward, password in pocket.
Try the wicket boldly with the password.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one slate leaving under your boot to ring the causeway stones like a struck shield, the guard room emptying upward through the roof hatch, and the drain chain ridden back down into a ring of raised spears'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the arch shadow under the causeway itself, wading pillar to pillar with the bog breathing around your knees, dice rattling overhead, and the gate footing rising ahead like a black altar'>>

choices.label: Climb the footing masonry to the wicket.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the footing climbed on mason marks worn soft, up past the toll brazier glow, over the parapet lip in the sentry gap, and down into the arch shadow of the gatehouse'>>

choices.label: Slip through into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='an old warden stair found where Sables fingers read tool marks in the cliff, steps cut inside a chimney of rock, choked with a centurys jackdaw nests but climbing sound and secret'>>

choices.label: Clear as you climb, slow and hidden.
Climb fast and let the nests fall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='nest muck and patience, the chimney topping out inside a roofless turret on the north wall itself, jackdaws resettling as if the wardens had never left, and the breach a short walk along the parapet'>>

choices.label: Walk the parapet to the breach and drop in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='a centurys nests going down the cliff face in a black avalanche of outraged birds, every jackdaw on the hill screaming your position to the watch fires, and the climb surrendered under a rain of goblin slingstones'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the deep watch waited out in a cliff hollow, cold soaking up through stone, until the sentry rounds thin to one bored walker and the moon drops behind the broken tower'>>

choices.label: Climb the last pitch in the dark gap.
Search the cliff hollow while you wait.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the pipe mouths sounded by knuckle tap the way well diggers do, dead thud left, live echo right, the drain mapping itself in knocks while the water listens, and the true run picked out by ear alone'>>

choices.label: Follow the live echo to the inner grate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a dam improvised from a fallen grate and bog turf, the culvert flow dropping to ankle deep in a hundred breaths, the walk in suddenly half as cold and twice as quiet'>>

choices.label: Walk the lowered channel to the inner grate.
Hurry before the dam decides otherwise.
Follow the otter run you spot while damming.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the dam deciding otherwise at the worst turn, a pulse of black water taking knees and lantern oil and nerve together, the party flushed back into the ditch like leaves, soaked and seen by the wall watch'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one testing shout up the pipe for the echo, and the echo answering twice, once in stone, once in goblin, the inner grate slamming somewhere ahead and the drain becoming a stone net drawn shut'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='kiln to dead kiln across the dell like a game of statues, soot masking faces and smell alike, and the cart tunnel mouth studied from an ovens shadow while a dig crew trundles bones out into the night'>>

choices.label: Slip into the cart tunnel behind the crew.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Mags rival, a wire thin young burner with singed brows who names himself Coalfinger, offering a quicker way in for your spare boots, his grin hungry, his tunnel real enough and propped like an afterthought'>>

choices.label: Pay the boots and take his quick way.
Refuse him with a laugh and walk on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Coalfingers way quick as promised and mean as feared, on hands and knees under props that click like dice, breathing charcoal by the spoonful, and out at last into the junction under the spoil chute owing him boots'>>

choices.label: Climb the spoil chute into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='Coalfinger shrugging at the refusal and selling the next best thing, you, his whistle bringing the dig crew at a trot while he counts his finders fee, the dell suddenly full of picks and lamplight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='trade pidgin proving thinner than soot, the crew foreman asking one question in real goblin, the silence after it very long, and the barrow ride to the cells very bumpy'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the ward smithy banked for the night, all shadow and cooling iron, a path through it to the inner door lined with tool racks, and one goblin smith asleep on the anvil with a hammer for a pillow'>>

choices.label: Thread the racks past the sleeper.
Muffle his hammer hand with a rag first, then thread.
Feel through the dark racks at speed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='an elbow finding the one hanging tong chain in the dark, iron applause ringing off every rack, the smith awake mid snore with his hammer already moving, and the smithy door filling with torches'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the ward well and its windlass, rope sound, drum greased, dropping past wet stone courses to a ledge that Finchs map calls the spring gallery, a forgotten service way running under the inner door'>>

choices.label: Ride the windlass down and take the spring gallery.
Trust the windlass at full speed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the windlass pawl shearing at half depth, rope screaming through the drum, the bucket ledge arriving hard and wet, and the long climb back up into waiting torchlight, wrung out and caught'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the wicket password tried a night stale, bone price answered by blank yellow stares and then by horns, the gate arch filling both ways, and the causeway a long bright walk into custody'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the pack strap chosen over the handhold for one grasping moment, the cliff taking its plain price for divided attention, and the heather far below keeping the rest of the season'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the third side mouth taken on a guess to save recounting, narrowing and narrowing until elbows pin and panic knocks, dug out backward by the ankles into the ditch, the night spent and the nerve with it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the diggings followed one gallery too deep on the smell of old air, lamplight ahead proving to be a returning crew with empty barrows and full hands, and no side pocket wide enough this time'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the hay wain ride ending at the kennel gate instead of the inner arch, pitchforks first as always at the kennels, and the hay giving up its stowaways to a ring of grinning handlers'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the laundry vats off the west passage, cold gray water and goblin wash on lines, a servants way threading behind the guard nook where nobody with a spear ever bothers to look'>>

choices.label: Thread the servants way to the block corner.
Steal the water round, buckets, yoke, and all.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Sable away to the kennel run with a wink and a strip of jerky, and two hundred heartbeats later the ward above erupting in honest dog joy at a sprung gate, boots thundering the wrong way while the cell block stands suddenly unwatched'>>

choices.label: Open the doors in the gift of noise.
Wait out the noise before touching a door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the noise waited out one round too long, the kennel chase looping back early with the dogs leading it, wet noses finding the block corner unerringly, and the whole west wing arriving behind them'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the drain grate in the block floor, lifted on Brams fingers a knuckle at a time, a dry way down and along under the cell row, tapping softly beneath each door to map which cells breathe'>>

choices.label: Come up inside the block past the warder entirely.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the party split against every instinct, you and Sable to the gallery, Bram and Elowen holding the block, two smaller shadows instead of one loud one, and the meeting point named twice so nobody can mishear'>>

choices.label: Go light and fast to the court gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the cistern lid seated a finger too true, the dark under it going close and closer, and the child crying at last at the shut black, the lid coming up into lamplight and leveled spears'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the all clear whistled to the block a shade too tunefully, answered by the warders own whistle, which was the real signal, and the block corner suddenly the best lit place in the west wing'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the block lamps lit for speed and shining like a festival through every grate and crack, the passage guards drawn moth sure, and the freeing undone by its own light'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the argument in the nook ending exactly as you cross upright through the lamp spill, two guards and one silence agreeing on what they see, and the west wing folding shut around the shout'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the minstrel boxes above the hall, dust sheeted and forgotten, a lords eye view of the sleeping windrows, and box to box a creeping road along the halls whole flank'>>

choices.label: Creep the boxes to the dais end.
Test each box floor before trusting it.
Trot the boxes without testing the floors.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the last box overhanging the dais itself, plunder heap below and the fresh lit passage behind it, a drop onto hay bales that were somebodys bedding once'>>

choices.label: Drop to the dais and take the landing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one box floor older than its neighbors, giving way in a shriek of nails into the pantry below, the party floundering in flour and pickled eels while the hall wakes hungry, driven out the midden door white as ghosts and empty handed'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the under dais strongroom found by its newer lock, Vessks own hoard, trade silver, a drovers strongbox unopened, and wedged behind it the caravans missing ledgers, proof of every name taken, worth more than silver to nine families'>>

choices.label: Take the ledgers and go for the court gallery.
Force the strongbox too while you are here.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the strongbox hasp screeching like a gutted hinge, the dais overhead creaking awake, and the strongroom becoming exactly what it was built to be, a room that holds things until their owner comes'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the forge quench trough tipped into the banked coals, steam rolling white and outraged through the armory corridor, iron hissing like geese, and every shape in it just weather to a watching eye'>>

choices.label: Walk out in the steam toward the court stair.
Linger in the armory for one more armload first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the steam thinning at the corridor mouth exactly as the smiths return, outlines resolving into strangers, tongs and hammers taking up the question, and the armory answering it with numbers'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the whole tablet stack proving heavier than curiosity, wax clattering on stone at the worst arch, and the plunder heap acquiring guards with nothing else to do all night'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the forge tongs lifted in passing out of pure farm habit, their chain following, the rack following the chain, and the corridor following all of it straight to you'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the oil carried uncorked for speed and speed proving the enemy, a slick heel turn at the service stair, lamp spark, and a corridor of sudden light with you inked black at its center, hunted out through the midden'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the incense drift read like river water, eddies at the niche mouths, a steady pull under the painted curtain, and a heavier pot lit to thicken the flow until the whole east passage swims'>>

choices.label: Move inside the drift to the curtain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the drift a gray river and you four stones in it, the novice tending pots an arms length away without seeing, and the curtain edge arriving like a bank in fog'>>

choices.label: Take the curtain edge.
Hold in the deepest drift though your chest heaves.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the thickened incense proving thicker than lungs, one smothered cough at the curtain edge, the drone stopping mid note, and the den curtain sweeping back on a shaman who was only pretending to scry'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the novices bone flute lifted from its belt loop in passing, three notes learned from a nights listening, the summons that empties the den when the shaman wants privacy, played soft and hoped hard'>>

choices.label: Play the summons and slip in as the den empties.
Play it loud to be sure it carries.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the third note a shade flat, the difference between privacy and alarm apparently one half tone, and the east wing arriving to explain the distinction at spear point'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the shamans true name demanded of the crow spirit, and the spirit laughing like dropped slates, names are not debts, it says, and neither is rescue now, the cage empty, the debt spent, the den awake'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one question too many for the bound shaman, whose answer is a bitten thumb and a smeared sign on the floor, wards waking wall by wall like lamps at dusk, and the east wing folding in'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the tally chalk pocketed as a souvenir and missed within the count, a small thing, but small things are what foremen are for, and the doors are shut before the next basket moves'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the drop to the court floor taken while the last captains still argue, a gallery shadow arriving among them like a delivered parcel, and the war court very pleased to have something to agree on'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Sable sent ahead alone to read the stone door approaches, back in a hundred breaths with the layout chalked on her palm, drummers here, trestle there, a wardens postern seam she cannot open but you might, and her flat advice, do not be on the floor when the singing starts'>>

choices.label: Move on the antechamber with her map in mind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the swing wide to skip the last courses paying out one fray too far, the rope parting at the whipping, a drop broken by a ledge and pride by the climb back, the well abandoned to torch answers above'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the spoil heap surfed like a hay slide into the antechamber, glorious for a breath and a half, then buried to the waist in bones at the feet of the door watch, dug out by many small unfriendly hands'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the sconce torch borrowed against the dark and carried like a confession down the boneyard drain, answered at the first turning by every eye the deep owns, the light doused too late to unsee you'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='a wardens armory niche off the hidden passage, gear of the order racked a century deep in dust, rotted straps, green bronze, and one horn of pale wound metal that the dust has not touched at all, taken with a wardens prayer you improvise on the spot'>>

choices.label: Carry the wardens horn to the doors blind side.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the last rank of the procession joined at a mourners shuffle, heads down among goblin backs, borrowed cloaks reeking of tallow, the column carrying you toward the trestle like a river carries driftwood'>>

choices.label: Peel off into the pillar shadows at the lamp ring.
Ride the column all the way to the trestle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the honor guard captain met eye to eye with the horn held plain, a veteran with a torn ear who listens to three sentences of truth without blinking, then jerks his chin toward Vessk, saying the chief hears mad things himself tonight, one more can join the queue'>>

choices.label: Put the truth to Vessk under the captains truce.
Offer the captain silver to clear your way.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the relief drummers line joined at the carry, a skin drum shouldered like a sack of turnips, the line trotting the gallery stair in step, and the balcony reached from inside the rhythm itself'>>

choices.label: Set the drum down and drift to the far stair.
Keep the drum and play along in the line.
Shoulder a second drum to look busier.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='your voice joined to Elowens counter chant on the second phrase, tuneless but stubborn, two voices making the wrong note bigger than one, the seal glow guttering like a candle in a doorway, and the shamans song tearing down the middle'>>

choices.label: Press through the dying song toward the trestle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the burning oil kicked in a bright fan across the processional rugs, flame walking up embroidered kings at a stroll, goblins abandoning rank for water and blame, and the trestle standing alone in a widening ring of light'>>

choices.label: Take the box straight off the trestle in the glare.
Herd the flames wider before you move.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the fire keeping its own counsel, a gust off the door gap folding the flame sheet back across your line, singed and smoked into the open where the ranks close like a purse, the rite delayed one night and the party keeping a cell warm for it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the drummers gallery stair taken against the tide of routing goblins, up where they are going down, out onto the keeps broken roofline with the box against your ribs and the night wind astonished to see you'>>

choices.label: Run the rooflines north and down the breach.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='roofline to wall walk to breach, the hills taken at a hunters jog under the setting moon, two days looping wide of every goblin line of march, cold camps and stolen turnips, the box quiet on your back as if it approves of patience'>>

choices.label: Come home the long way.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the deepest carving pried at for the crown behind it, and the wardens masonry answering as built, a soft fall of counterweighted stone sealing the passage both ways, dug out at dawn by puzzled goblins into custody, the rite long over and merely postponed'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='bone dust and one held sneeze that wins its argument on the ninth landing, echoing down the long stair like a war horn of the nose, and the pillar shadows emptying of everything but goblins'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the honor guard captain weighing your silver with genuine sorrow, then taking it and you both, explaining that a bribe is property and property goes to the chief, the queue for Vessks justice long and the rite visible from it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the relief line stepping on the offbeat you supplied, a stumble running up the whole file drum by drum, the captain wheeling with his knotted cord, and the balcony becoming a very small room with one door'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the third call one call too many, panic curdling into pattern, captains triangulating the vaults with torch lines, and the horn answering its own echo in a room already full of listeners'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the second lashing parting with a groan the drums cannot cover, the scaffold sagging like a tired horse, the drum captain following the sound to its source, and the gallery holding everything it catches'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the postern crack widened one finger for a better view, and the view improving in both directions, the shamans eye meeting yours down the gap for a heartbeat that lasts a season, the blind side blind no more'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the carved faces front taken in the open to save a scramble, silhouette printed on lamp glow for the whole floor to read, and the descent finishing in a forest of raised spears grown up around the chin'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='a pause to wrap the humming box mid run, the hum swelling under cloth like a hive disturbed, its one note calling down the corridors clear as a bell to everything that hunts by ear tonight, run down within sight of the drain'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the bound wizard paraded through the ward for the freed to see, one gloating circuit too many, his lips moving inside the gag, the sigil at his throat flaring white, and the rope holding nothing but warm air and a smell of ash, the night still won but the ledger left open'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the little shrine of the road inside the gate, wax stubs and travelers tokens, an old porter feeding the lamp who nods at your sword and says the roads been eating people since the wardens guttered out, and nobody remembers what the wardens even warded'>>

choices.label: Light a stub for luck and ask him about the wardens.
Light a stub and go in to the warmth.
Stay through the lamp trimming to hear the whole tale.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the porters answer worth the wax, the warden order kept the old sites quiet, barrows and doors and deep places, paid in kings silver until the kings stopped paying, and their last chapterhouse stood, he thinks, somewhere in the Hollow Hills'>>

choices.label: Carry that into the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the shrine lamp better company than courage, the curfew bell finding you still praying, the inn barred by town law till dawn, and the muster happening at first light on the other side of a locked gate'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Pip the pot boy trading kitchen gossip for a copper and the glory of being asked, the Redcloaks bought no rations for the road, not a loaf, which even a pot boy knows means they mean to turn back rich or not go far at all'>>

choices.label: Take that thought to the clerk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Pells survey maps unrolled under the lamp for anyone signing, the Hollow Hills in faded ink, Harrowstone drawn with its double wall, and in a surveyors hand along the east face, drains east under the wall, three words worth more than the fifty crowns'>>

choices.label: Commit the map to memory and go find the dwarf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the vigil grandmother at the gate one last time, pressing honey cakes wrapped in a kerchief into Elowens hands, naming her granddaughter Berta among the taken, and asking nothing at all, which asks everything'>>

choices.label: Promise her nothing aloud and everything else, and march.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the second farmstead burned days fresher than the first, smoke still ghosting from the byre, and down the well house steps two eyes in the dark that turn out to be an old couple, alive, hidden, half starved'>>

choices.label: Coax them up and hear what they saw.
Leave food and press on hard for the crow fields.
Track the cart dust cross country while it hangs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='their story between mouthfuls, cage carts rolling east three nights running, small drivers cursing in no honest tongue, and a man in gray walking beside the last cart reading a book by no lamp anyone could see'>>

choices.label: Set them on the road to the toll shrine keeper and go on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the old couple pointed west with bread and the shrine keepers name, their blessing spent on you like the last coin in a purse, and the crow funnel turning ahead over the fallow country'>>

choices.label: Make for the crows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the cart dust chased cross country on fresh anger, hedges and ditches eating the miles you meant to save, and the party staggering into the crow fields a day late and spent, the trail aged past reading'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the weir walk below the landing, hurdles and plank ways over sliding water, Wecks toll for the shortcut one hours honest work lifting eel traps heavy as sin'>>

choices.label: Pay the hour and lift traps.
Walk the plank line fast through the rising fog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the plank line in fog a lesson in humility, one slick board turning underfoot, the weir pool cold as charity, hauled out by eel men and wrung out on the bank while the day and the trail drain away west'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='traps lifted and Wecks tongue loosened by shared work, the thing he did not say on the barge, three nights back a low boat poled downriver dark and quiet, riding heavy, and on its stern rail, teeth painted red as fresh paint'>>

choices.label: Ask what a goblin wants with a boat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Wecks shrug worth a chapter, goblins hate water, so whatever rode that boat mattered more than hate, heavy, boxed, and bound downriver toward the marsh country while everyone watches the hills'>>

choices.label: File it away and follow the crows west.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the drover shrine in its hollow, horn stakes and braided grass offerings generations deep, and dead center on the altar stone, wrong as a wasp in honey, a fresh red tooth painted on slate'>>

choices.label: Let Elowen read the tooth against the offerings.
Knock the slate off the altar and move on.
Follow the drum sound straight over the rise.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Elowens reading careful as stitchwork, the tooth is not desecration but notice, territory claimed, posted where drovers post their own signs, which means the Redtooth think like herders now, and something has given them borders to keep'>>

choices.label: Carry the thought east along the track.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the hollow behind you and its echo with you, because on the last rise the wind brings drums, far off and patient, keeping a time no herd ever walked to, east, under the hills'>>

choices.label: Follow the track to the crow fields.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the drums followed straight over the rise on pure pull, curiosity walking you into a picket of small spears set exactly for the curious, and the drums keeping their time all the way to the cells'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Tallows office wain on its side, bills of lading snowed across the fallow, a locked money box under the seat, and nailed inside the lid the guard roster, six names, and only four sets of guard boots among the wreckage'>>

choices.label: Track the two missing guards from the ditch line.
Force the money box first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the money box answering the pry bar with a merchants needle trap, a scratch and a numbness climbing the arm by nightfall, Elowen burning the fever out in a shepherd hut over two lost days, the trail cold as the box was empty'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the missing guards trail short and honest, one dead at the hedge line face to the enemy, buried under fieldstone with his sword laid true, the other tracked to the road west, running still by the stride of it, and nobody says coward out loud over a fresh grave'>>

choices.label: Say the drovers words and go back for the knocking.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the wagon jack from Tallows office wain, drover engineering older than sieges, walked under the wain bed and cranked until the whole world lifts one honest inch at a time, Finch drawn out grinning at the dignity of it'>>

choices.label: Splint him and hear everything he knows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='first watch shared with Bram, the fire down to coals, and unasked, the story under his scars, a shieldwall broken at the Redwater not by goblins but by a captain too proud to sound retreat, and why he only signs with people who admit they are afraid'>>

choices.label: Keep the coals and the confidence till the watch turns.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='dawn watch with Elowen naming constellations wrong on purpose until you argue, which was the point, because arguing keeps sentries awake, her grin saying she learned that from a book and improved it'>>

choices.label: Wake the others and take the drag trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Sables knife lesson by ember light, how to hold it so it cannot be taken, when to show it so it need not be used, and the only rule she calls a rule, never throw your last one'>>

choices.label: Sleep on it and rise for the drag trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='Tam fed and walking beside you while the lane cools, working up to it for half a mile, then the question level as a plumb line, is my father alive, Hobb the lead drover, and the only honest answer being that you do not know and are going to find out, which he weighs like a man and pays back in the coin he has, a guards bragging remembered whole, the cell watch changes when the torch burns down to the painted ring'>>

choices.label: Send him south with word and turn northeast.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='pale lights off the causeway flank, drifting hip high over the bog like lanterns carried by nothing, Elowen calling them marsh gas in the exact voice of someone quoting a book she half believes'>>

choices.label: Watch the lights until their pattern shows.
Follow the nearest light out onto the bog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the light always one step farther, the tussocks always one step fewer, and the bog closing its ledger the way it has closed a hundred, cold and quiet and owed nothing'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the true pattern surfacing under Sables stare, one steady lantern among the drifters, goblin made, swinging a relay code gate to gate, and its rhythm readable as a ferry timetable, dark water, dark water, wicket open at the change'>>

choices.label: Time the wicket change and move on the gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the change called soft as Sable counts it home, the last stretch of causeway crossed in the relay lanterns own blind beat, and the wicket shadow swallowing the party whole'>>

choices.label: Slip through into the outer ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a hawks eyrie on the second pitch, sticks and sheep bones wedged in a cleft, the mother hawk mantling at the party with a scream that could carry to the watch fires if she keeps it up'>>

choices.label: Let Elowen gentle her with slow hands and a strip of jerky.
Rob the eyrie for the eggs while she rages.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the eyrie robbed and the mountain siding with the hawk, wings and talons and outrage driving boots back down ledge by ledge to the heather, the climb spent, the night spent, the eggs not even good eating'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hawk gentled to a furious settle, one tiercel eye tracking Elowen as she backs away bowing like a courtier, and the pitch above the eyrie clean and quiet all the way to the wall'>>

choices.label: Climb on to the broken wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Elowens counting song started low in the culvert mouth, a hedge school trick for dark places, each verse a turning, each chorus a count of steps, the drain answering in echoes that stack like shelves'>>

choices.label: Walk the song into the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the song mapping the drain as it goes, echoes shortening where side mouths open, and at the third verse, scratched numerals in the stone at shoulder height, warden survey marks counting down toward the inner grate exactly as the old page promised'>>

choices.label: Follow the numerals to the grate chamber.
Sing the chorus louder for confidence in the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the chorus finding an audience, the echo answering in goblin from the grate chamber ahead, and the drain becoming a stone throat with a shout at both ends, backed out soaked into waiting hands'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the numerals ending at zero beside the inner grate, its pin already hanging by rust, the wardens having measured this door for their own returns once, and the stairs beyond breathing ward air'>>

choices.label: Ease the grate and climb into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Mags second story told to the kilns more than to you, that her grandmother burned charcoal for the warden order itself, who paid to keep these tunnels open, because a door you seal needs a back way for the sealers, and wardens always came in pairs'>>

choices.label: Ask her for the sealers back way.
Doubt her aloud and demand proof.
