nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='doubt paid in Mags own coin, a shrug, a poke at the kiln, and directions given with perfect courtesy that walk the party in a patient circle back to the dell mouth at dawn, the night gone and the old woman gone with it'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the sealers way marked on your palm in charcoal by a hand steady as a beam scale, third fork high side, spoil chute, and a word for the dark, the wardens counted everything, so count, and Mags eyes saying she knows exactly what sleeps under the hill'>>

choices.label: Take the sealers way to the spoil chute.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the east grating up close at last, and behind it merchant Tallow himself gripping the bars, voice sanded to a whisper, nine alive, the child fevering, guards thick till the deep drums call them down, and his one demand pressed through the iron, whatever else you do, the child goes out first'>>

choices.label: Promise it and take the midden door in.
Pass your spare knife through the bars first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the knife halfway through the bars when the corner torch rounds early, iron ringing on cobbles, Tallow palming the blade even as the shout goes up, and the party pinned against the grating it came to open'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a sound through the second cell door that is not weeping, a clapping rhythm soft as moth wings, the older drover children teaching the little ones the quiet game, loudest whisper loses, and the block keeping time under its own jailers noses'>>

choices.label: Learn the rhythm before you touch the block.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the games rhythm learned through the door, tapped back once, and the clapping answering in perfect time with nine peoples worth of held breath behind it, the block already organized and waiting for exactly you'>>

choices.label: Move on the cell block in the games own time.
Tap the rhythm again, eager, to be sure.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the second tap one flourish too fond, the warders chair creaking as his head tilts to a sound that is not rats, and the block waking to lamplight and shouts with the rhythm dead in the air'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the trophy wall behind the dais stair, shields and standards nailed up like hides, border war plunder a generation old, and dead center, scarred and unmistakable, a round shield with the boar of Brams own company, the dwarfs breath going very slow and very even'>>

choices.label: Give Bram the moment he is owed.
Strip the whole wall of anything worth carrying.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the wall stripped greedy and wholesale, nails singing out of old timber, one standard pole ringing off the dais like a dropped spear, and the hall waking to find its history walking out the door, briefly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the boar shield lifted down without one sound, Brams thumb crossing the old paint once, the shield going onto his back where it has always belonged, and the dwarf when he turns wearing a face you are glad is on your side'>>

choices.label: Climb to the gallery landing with him.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the saints crypt niches behind the boneworks, warden burials by the marks, each skull pillowed on a chime of pale metal, and Elowen reading the grave signs twice before she says it, wardens sang in choirs, always in choirs, one voice was never enough'>>

choices.label: Take one wardens chime, with respect.
Pocket the grave silver while you are here.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the grave silver lifted and every niche mouth grinding a hands width shut at once, dust sifting like a held sneeze, the boneworks beyond stirring at the sound of their dead objecting, and the east wing walked out of empty handed and marked'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='one chime taken from under a skull older than the keep, cold and somehow willing, a note stored in it like water in a jar, and Elowens whisper as she wraps it, if one voice is not enough, we bring a wardens with us'>>

choices.label: Carry the chime to the shamans den.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Tallow raising his right hand in the lamp dark and deputizing the whole cell block under freight law, drovers, children, and you, sworn porters of one consignment, each other, the oath older than marshals and twice as binding, and nine backs straightening under it'>>

choices.label: Sign the bond with your mark and set the signal.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='Malverins traveling desk glimpsed through the shutter gap, and on it beside the chained book an open ledger in a fine hand, sums paid to the Redtooth, sums owed to him by name after name, and one entry underlined at the foot of the page, the Coil expects the door open by winter, payment on the second seal'>>

choices.label: Carry that name down toward the crypt stair.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='murals down the wardens passage where the spy slots pause, the choir painted at this same door in older robes, twelve singers, one raised hand, and the door shown shut with the crowned sleeper behind it dreaming a winter that fills the next three panels'>>

choices.label: Take the lesson to the doors blind side.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the pillar forest floor itself, bench stones and offering troughs giving belly cover between drumbeats, a slow crawl through the gallerys own furniture with rank boots passing an arms length away'>>

choices.label: Crawl the last trough line to the lamp ring.
Crawl through the drum pause to save time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the trough line ending in the trestles own shadow, dust in your teeth, drums overhead like weather, and the waking words beginning close enough to feel on your neck'>>

choices.label: Rise on the blind side and move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='one trough short of the shadow when the drums pause between verses, your crawl loud as a landslide in the sudden hush, and small hard hands finding your ankles before the next beat lands'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the inn stable yard where a drover mare stands unclaimed, the ostler keeping her for an owner two weeks silent, her nose bag paid up out of his own coppers because, he shrugs, somebody will come, they always come'>>

choices.label: Scratch her ears and carry the ache inside.
Take the unclaimed mare for one ride round the walls.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Pells last word off the ledger, quiet as a bookmark, the marshal cannot say so but I keep her accounts, whatever pays goblins in old silver has deeper pockets than a keep full of rust, mind whose war you are walking into'>>

choices.label: Mind it and go find the dwarf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one ride on the unclaimed mare to feel like a knight, one gate guard with no sense of humor about horse theft, and the whole commission spent explaining yourself to the watch until the writ goes elsewhere'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the commission talked over one table too many, your route and your hour common knowledge by the second cider, and at the milestone at dawn, Vanes Redcloaks lounging with the head start you gave them, the marshal quietly unsigning your name'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the toll shrine bell found after all, half buried in the ditch where deserters dropped it for weighing too much, rehung crooked on its yoke by four sets of hands for no reason anyone says aloud, and rung once, softly, for the road'>>

choices.label: Leave it ringing behind you and make for the crows.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the west bank walked instead of ridden, alder shade and heron stalk, and in a mudbank like a signature, one soft shoed footprint among goblin treads, days old, pointing downriver toward the marshes while everything else points at the hills'>>

choices.label: Note it hard and follow the crows west.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the last waystone before the fallow country counted at eleven teeth, and under the count, older paint ghosting through, a wardens mark half devoured by the grin painted over it, the new border eating the old one'>>

choices.label: Carry both marks to the crow fields.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the flooded ford tried at the wrong hour to save a mile, the current voting last and loudest, gear soaked, tinder drowned, and the party limping back to Barrowmere behind its own sneezes'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='under the third wain a childs slate, letters practiced in a careful row, TAM TAM TAM and one wobbly BERTA, schoolwork carried to market and dropped in the running, wiped clean of mud with a thumb and pocketed like a writ'>>

choices.label: Search on for whoever knocked.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the council hour spent flat on the wain boards over Finchs map scrap, Sable arguing culvert, Bram arguing causeway like an honest soldier, Elowen asking what the wardens would have used until everyone stops and looks at the drains again'>>

choices.label: Sleep on it and let the storm choose the camp.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the trail pushed at moonrise against every counsel, night sign misread within the mile, and the hunting picket that watches the drag trail by dark folding around the party like a purse string, the rescue joining the rescued'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the toll brazier goblins called away mid dice by a horn from the gatehouse, the causeway standing empty as a held breath, stakes and coins abandoned, and a hundred clear paces to the arch for whoever moves now'>>

choices.label: Take the empty causeway at a dead run.
Scoop the abandoned dice stakes as you pass.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the run timed to the horns own echo, boots loud only to you, the arch shadow gained as the dicers troop back arguing about whose stakes are whose, none the wiser and one party the richer'>>

choices.label: Slip through the wicket into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the abandoned dice too pretty to pass, weighted goblin bone in your palm when the dicers troop back early, and property being the one law every camp shares, argued at spear point all the way to the cells'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a climbers cache in the cliff hollow, warden made by its knots, rope pegs and a rusted lantern hook and a coil that crumbles at a pull, but the pegs, the pegs are bronze and true and exactly a bodys length apart up the worst pitch'>>

choices.label: Climb the peg line to the wall breach.
Trust the old warden rope up the last reach.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the ancient rope trusted for one reach too far, a century of damp letting go all at once, and the mountain finishing the argument the rope started'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='an otter run threading the culvert bank, low and dry and smelling of fish supper, wide enough for shoulders if pride stays outside, and its far end opening under the drain stairs inside the wall itself'>>

choices.label: Take the otter run under the wall.
Push the pinch with your pack still on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the otter run pinching at the worst elbow, pack straps jamming where an otter carries only appetite, dug out backward by the ankles with the night spent and the wall watch curious about the grunting'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the dig crews shift song learned through a props width of dark, call and answer in mangled trade tongue, hauled bones and counted coins, and its rhythm the exact cover four sets of boots need to cross the junction unheard'>>

choices.label: Cross the junction inside the songs beat.
Join the answer line to blend deeper.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the songs answer line joined one verse too boldly, the call stopping mid word, lamplight swinging toward harmony nobody ordered, and the junction becoming a chorus of one party and many picks'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the water round stolen whole, two buckets and a yoke from the laundry vats, carried down the cell row at a trusties shuffle, water ladled through gratings into nine pairs of hands while the warder dreams, and the block mapped cup by cup'>>

choices.label: Set the buckets down and move on the block.
Carry the yoke through the low lintel at speed.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the yoke catching the low lintel, two buckets ringing down the block like temple gongs, the warder surfacing mid snore with his keys already swinging, and the water round ending in irons'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hall hound, gray at the muzzle and chained by the hearth, watching the party thread the sleepers with ears up and tail still, bought one strip at a time with the last of the jerky until its head goes back down on its paws, a toll paid to the only honest sentry in Harrowstone'>>

choices.label: Cross the last of the floor to the dais stair.
Stare the hound down and save the jerky.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the hound tested with a stare instead of supper, and old dogs knowing exactly what stares mean, one bark like a hammer on a board and the windrows rising around you, driven back out the midden with the hall howling'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the novice cornered soft in the niche shadow, young for a goblin and shaking, trading everything for a whispered promise it can desert tonight, the shaman scries the party since the moor, the den wards answer to bone not steel, and the sigil hangs on a thong the shaman never knots'>>

choices.label: Let it slip away and take the curtain edge.
Send the novice ahead to hold the curtain for you.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the novice trusted one favor too far, sent ahead to hold the curtain and holding instead a whole conversation with its master, the den emptying toward you with the novice pointing, young, shaking, and sorry, which helps nobody in the cells'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the court floor crossed after the breakup behind a train of plunder porters, a crate shouldered as a pass, Malverins own baggage train carrying you toward the crypt stair in plain sight, the best shadows being other peoples burdens'>>

choices.label: Set the crate down at the stair and slip aside.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a wardens spy slot at the posterns own hinge, the trestle framed close enough to count the reliquary rivets, the shamans song found breath by breath, and the exact half beat where the singer must inhale marked like a door left open'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite at the half beat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the lamp ring counted from the last pillar, eleven lamps, two guttering, the gap between them the width of a cart door, and the routes to the trestle rehearsed twice behind closed eyes before a single boot moves'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite through the guttering gap.
Cross while the near lamp gutters lowest.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='one guttering lamp choosing that heartbeat to flare, the gap becoming a stage and the crawl a performance, reviewed by the nearest rank with spears leveled, the rite pausing politely while you are collected'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='Vessks patience misjudged by one demand too many, the chief grown tired of humans who bargain like victors, and the honor guard closing with the peculiar gentleness goblins save for valuable hostages'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the drum skin split by a misjudged elbow, one flat note in a wall of right ones, the captains cord finding the flaw faster than thought, and the gallery box shutting its one door'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Martas oldest lodger asked after and granted, Sister Maren, blind and birch white in the upstairs box bed, last of the warden order by her own account, her hands reading your face like a page while Marta hovers'>>

choices.label: Ask her what the wardens actually warded.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='Marens answer dry as pressed flowers, not monsters, child, sleepers, the deep places are full of old kings who did not die properly, and a seal is not a lock, it is a lullaby, stop the singing and the sleeper stirs, then her grip going hard, if someone is digging at Harrowstone, you go and you sing it back down'>>

choices.label: Carry the lullaby word to the dwarf by the fire.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the lead wains floor ringing double under a knuckle, a false bottom drovers use for the road purse, pried up on a shared look, and inside, untouched by the raiders, the crews wages and a bundle of letters home, sealed and stamped and never sent'>>

choices.label: Take charge of wages and letters both.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the letters counted against the guard roster, one for every name, which means every name expected to come home, packed in oilcloth against the weather with the wages under them, freight now, yours to deliver'>>

choices.label: Go back to the knocking under the lead wain.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Wecks parting gift pressed on Elowen at the rail, a river charm of braided eel skin and a drilled gray pebble, against the marsh, he says, not the river, the river and I are square, but if your road ever runs south into the Greymarsh, wear it, and do not trust the lights'>>

choices.label: Stow the charm and follow the crows west.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hedge bones read by lantern shade, not a hedge at all but the posts of an old droving corral, which means a well, and the well sweet under its lid, waterskins filled to bursting while the storm grumbles itself out'>>

choices.label: Rise watered and rested for the drag trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the lamed drivers satchel left hanging on the cage lashing, and in it among fish hooks and dice, a folded sheet of soft leather scratched with a route map, not to the hills, south, causeway lines through marsh country to a circle marked with a coiled snake, pay dirt for somebody, someday'>>

choices.label: Pocket the marsh map and see to the boy.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a chain locker in the gatehouse footing, portcullis gear a century seized, and through its rusted grating a crawl space running clean under the gate passage itself, floored with dropped coins nobody could ever reach'>>

choices.label: Crawl the coin floor under the gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the crawl space giving onto the winch room stair inside the wall, pockets heavier by a fistful of strangers coins, boots quiet on steps built for chains'>>

choices.label: Take the winch stair down into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the old beacon basket on its cliff bracket above the second pitch, iron rusted to lace but the bracket bolts true, and a wardens sight line straight down the valley, every approach to Harrowstone laid out like a supper table'>>

choices.label: Fix the watch fires positions from up here.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the watch fires committed to memory with their blind lanes between, a map made of dark stripes, and the climb resumed knowing exactly where not to be seen'>>

choices.label: Slip the breach on the counted circuit.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a side chamber off the dry ledge, a warden tally room by the shelf stubs, rotted ledgers returned to soil, but the wall itself scribed deep, columns of years and one repeating entry, sang the turning, all quiet, decade after decade until the entries just stop'>>

choices.label: Read the last legible year and move on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the last entry cut shallower than the rest, a different hand, no songs left, the door must hold, and under it nothing but smoke stain, the lantern beam trembling only because your hand does'>>

choices.label: Take the ledge on to the inner grate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Mags live kiln opened a hand at her nod, the charge glowing like a dragons dream, and behind the heat shimmer, her true door, a fired clay pipe tall as a dwarf running straight into the hill, warm as an oven and dry as regret'>>

choices.label: Duck through the kiln pipe while she holds the charge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the pipe walked at a crouch in bread scented dark, soot writing your biography on every surface, and the far end grating up into the ward corner where the ovens once vented'>>

choices.label: Lift the vent grating and slip into the ward.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the dig crews manifest board pilfered off the broken barrow, tallies of bones by the basket, and the counts wrong for a battlefield, right for a graveyard, whole rows, whole families, the wardens buried around the thing they guarded like a hedge of their own dead'>>

choices.label: Put the board back exactly and take the chute.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the inner door reveal, scratched initials and tally marks of bored garrison boys a century gone, and among them, cut deeper and older, a wardens mark with an arrow pointing down and two words, choir stair, the buildings own memory outliving its keepers'>>

choices.label: Follow the old arrow down into the under keep.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Tallows whispered muster through the grate, done twice daily to keep heads counted and hearts up, nine names in order of age with Berta youngest, two drovers fevered but walking, and Hobb, Tams father, alive, his arm splinted with a spoon'>>

choices.label: Tell Tallow his freight is about to move.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the word passing cell to cell in the quiet game rhythm, nine people packing nothing at all with tremendous care, and the block ready before the keys even come off the board'>>

choices.label: Plan the out with the whole block ready.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the wax tablets margins worked over by Elowen in the plunder shadow, the fine hand keeping a second ledger in cipher between the lines, sums to something called the Coil, and payment terms that read less like wages and more like tribute'>>

choices.label: Copy the cipher lines onto your own slate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the copy made letter by meaningless letter for wiser eyes than yours, Heddas clerks or the abbeys, the tablet returned to its straw nest unmissed, and the fresh lit passage waiting'>>

choices.label: Follow the passage toward the war court.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the crow spirit lingering past its debt out of pure corvid nosiness, offering gossip free, the ash robed one smells of river mud under the ash, the shaman scries him nightly and tells Vessk nothing, and below the door, the sleeper has started answering the seal one note late, like a singer losing the tune'>>

choices.label: Thank it and climb toward the gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the spirit unfolding upward through stone like smoke through cloth, one feather of actual matter left turning on the floor, black with a white tip, pocketed for no reason you could defend aloud'>>

choices.label: Take the gallery stairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Malverins pacing counted from above like a jailers rounds, eleven strides, turn, eleven strides, a scholars discipline over a debtors nerves, and every eleventh stride a glance at the processional stair as if something might come up it early, he is not the top of this ladder, and he is afraid of the next rung'>>

choices.label: Slip down toward the crypt approaches with that.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the last mural panel studied a breath longer, twelve wardens at the door but one painted turning away, hand over mouth, and under the flaking wash a scribed correction in the same old strokes, eleven sang, one listened, the listener keeps the count'>>

choices.label: Go to the blind side and keep the count yourself.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the panic shopped like a market, a dropped torch collected, a watchword learned from a shouting captain, spear racks passed and one goblin cloak lifted off a hook, the confusion paying wages to anyone calm enough to collect them'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite dressed in borrowed chaos.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the rite time counted from inside the drum line, nine beats and a rest, nine and a rest, and in every rest the shamans song alone and naked for half a breath, the exact seam in the night where a wrong note would tear'>>

choices.label: Carry the count down to the rite.
